name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: It is so much worse than you know
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57352886:6T3ELNlNO:m:1:3103520637:52EA509ADFE618E683D386ABAAE2F590:r "Never Underestimate the Power of Stupid People In Large Groups") Peter, When I ran for office, I thought I knew how bad things were in Congress. I could see that Congress was failing the American people. It is why I decided to run for Congress. I have been for just over five months, and I can say with certainty that things here in Washington as so much worse than the American people know. Trust me, you have no idea how bad it is. Neither did I until I got here, but I learned. Nancy Pelosi truly leads with an iron fist, and she wants our nation to be a socialist utopia. [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57352886:6T3ELNlNO:m:1:3103520637:52EA509ADFE618E683D386ABAAE2F590:r "WATCH THE
VIDEO - LEARN THE TRUTH")The people here, none of them have built anything. They don't understand what it is to meet a payroll or have to lay off an employee so you can stay in business. They know their way around cocktail hours and summer garden parties. If you are OK with this, you can stop reading - this message isn't for you. **[I had a fascinating conversation with Tucker Carlson on this issue. I think you should take the time to listen.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57352886:6T3ELNlNO:m:1:3103520637:52EA509ADFE618E683D386ABAAE2F590:r "I had a fascinating conversation with Tucker
Carlson on this issue. I think you should take the time to listen.")** Minutes after getting to Congress, I learned that the system is failing the American people, and I realized that if we don't fight RIGHT NOW, it will be too late. I have been fighting, and you can see how they have reacted - stripping me of my committee assignments, calling me a fool, slandering me, and treating me like I'm Ilhan Omar or Rashida Tlaib--both of whom are terrorist sympathizers. The left knows I can see through their lies and that I am going to expose them for what they are. This makes me a target - their whole con relies on nobody exposing them for what they are. They are going to throw everything they can at me to get me to go away. I can take it, but only if I know that Conservatives across the nation are fighting with me. **[If you believe that America deserves better than I, you need to make your most generous donation to help me continue the fight against Pelosi's socialist agenda.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57352886:6T3ELNlNO:m:1:3103520637:52EA509ADFE618E683D386ABAAE2F590:r "If you believe that America deserves better than I, you need to
make your most generous donation to help me continue the fight against Pelosi’s socialist agenda.")** They simply don't understand America - the nation they profess to work for. I understand your needs, and I understand how precious our nation is; I will never give up in my fight to protect our great country. **[I need to know if you are standing with me.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57352886:6T3ELNlNO:m:1:3103520637:52EA509ADFE618E683D386ABAAE2F590:r "I need to know if you are
standing with me.")** God Bless America, [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57352886:6T3ELNlNO:m:1:3103520637:52EA509ADFE618E683D386ABAAE2F590:r "Marjorie Taylor Greene")
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA) | | [WATCH THE VIDEO - LEARN THE TRUTH](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57352886:6T3ELNlNO:m:1:3103520637:52EA509ADFE618E683D386ABAAE2F590:r "WATCH THE VIDEO - LEARN THE TRUTH")

name: Latinos for America First
subject: We are being INVADED in TEXAS. Help US SAVE AMERICA!
body:

[](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/223571?id=360881.2165.1.28c998d30a8e835e92ce8ea374223d97) |
---
Hello Patriots Today our National Coordinator submitted this Op-Ed to local newspapers. Please share this Op-Ed with anyone in your circle and post everywhere on social media AND most importantly send this letter to your ELECTED OFFICIALS. Don't forget to donate below to keep us moving forward and doing all we can to #SAVE AMERICA
---
| | [ Donate $25.00 Today ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/223571?id=360881.2166.1.d1b596a4250f0e41d21fb55c06fe3249)
---
LETTER TO THE EDITOR:
Who remembers the remarks made by President Trump about the type of people that are illegally crossing our southern border? Remember how the media spun those comments misleading the American People alleging Trump had made disparaging remarks AGAINST ALL Hispanics? The narrative became that President Trump called ALL Mexicans rapists and murderers and that Mexico wasn't sending their best? That's a LIE! Customs and Border Patrol agents are reporting the capture of hundreds of actual violent criminals, gang members, sex offenders and even terrorists who are listed on watch lists. Don't believe me? Visit the Websites and social media platforms of the CBP various sectors and see for yourselves. Not every individual who illegally crosses our border is filled with good intentions and simply looking for a better life.
I've always said that Mexico is partly to blame for the Immigration problem. Because, they are the last country that these illegals must travel through to reach our southern border. Mexico is doing very little to absolutely NOTHING to stop the hundreds of thousands of illegals traveling in caravan groups across their own southern border en route to the United States. Violent Drug Cartels don't only smuggle drugs & contraband into our country. They're conducting full blown, wide scale Human Smuggling/Sex Trafficking operations. These cartels are running a modern day slavery trade, Right Underneath the Noses of the American People! All for profit. The going rate for transport collected by the cartels ranges from twenty-five hundred to nine thousand dollars per person. And these aren't just people from Mexico, Central or South America that are coming. There are people from other parts of the world like Africa, Haiti, China, Russia and the Middle East taking the treacherous and dangerous illegal migration journey.
How is this allowed to continue to happen? The current Administration and Democrats are SILENT! Why?
Some of the cartels' "cargo" includes innocent children, often unaccompanied. Women and children are sexually assaulted by their coyote handlers and criminal members in the caravan groups they travel in. Approximately sixty percent of the females (some teenagers) arriving at the processing centers are already pregnant. We know that means when they give birth, their babies receive "Anchor Baby" status and are automatically classified as American citizens. Legal immigrants waiting in line are being disenfranchised!
Our federal tax dollars and state resources are being used to process and transport thousands of illegals on a daily basis. Funding is provided to pay for bus tickets and airfare to transport illegals across our State and Nation. Where are they being taken? Seems no one in our government is equipped with that information and the answer isn't readily available to the American public. Once processed, illegals also receive cash or electronic funds cards exceeding one thousand dollars per adult. Shouldn't that type of funding be appropriated to assist American Citizens who are in need? Some of us are still trying to recover from the hardships brought on by covid. The American people waited almost a year for their stimulus relief while congress prioritized sham Impeachment circus hearings over the fate of unemployed citizens and suffering small businesses.
Yet, the illegals that are arriving daily at the processing centers receive IMMEDIATE ASSISTANCE. This isn't Fair! It's Wrong! And why do we continue to send foreign humanitarian aid to Mexico and Central American countries if they aren't helping the most needy and vulnerable of their own citizens? Instead, those very people are flocking to the United States and literally flooding across our southern border! This crisis equates to INVASION! Americans are at high risk! Law Enforcement officials and County sheriff's departments are reporting increased crime rates related to vehicle and property thefts and assaults by illegals. We've had ENOUGH press conferences and photo ops at the border by "concerned" politicians and representatives. We know what the problem is.
The real questions that need to be addressed and remain to be answered are;
Where, Who, What & When?
_Where are all the illegals being sent?
_Who is monitoring or responsible for the unaccompanied children?
_What safeguards are in place to ensure that those who are released report for their court hearings and that the influx of those who are recieving a government issued ID don't end up on our voter rolls?
_When will Washington do something to secure our borders, stop the influx of illegals coming across and FINALLY give the American people Immigration Reform Legislation that becomes The Law and is Actually Enforced? Our Elected Officials have had DECADES to solve this issue. We're tired of the empty promises and lip service. We won't settle for anything less than RESULTS!
This isn't a partisan issue or party affiliate problem. Race isn't a factor. This affects and should concern Every American. A simple internet search will provide email and phone contacts for every state and federal elected official. I'm urging every concerned citizen to contact those elected officials and demand Action in securing our borders and enforcing our nation's immigration laws! It used to be "See Something - Say Something". We've been catapulted to
"SEE SOMETHING, DO SOMETHING!
# AmericaFirst
Signed,
Latinos for America First Op-Ed written by Maria Miller National Coordinator
---

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: America First isn't going away. We're going on tour!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bUBXhug7pLwXvpUH7lpxIZDTXWOApKXwjzUjyxUmWyHk3JNzGoJPbIOpSFPpjrbJgaMDpNtWurSwrJLjGSGPPdOVRcUZOlB-n1zQ9ovFpQg0jeU_8lF4sAE4U-JAuu6KZ1xL2_jxMpf0pjE9mAKS-Uo1KCxPsOZ9SuStTmUU68gqN71DeA4Xzw==&c=j6DXrErkx4nLuC1oUolGU4CCbLCYPxD-BYTGgyepl-PntO45-5xENA==&ch=Y07V2hotRseHqFv4ZtCRHFHJOtNSxXDrPcP9YV9uyY67PdYc3tunxw==&jrc=1)
---
| Peter,
On Friday, I kicked off my America First Tour to send a strong message to the weak Establishment in both parties: America First isn't going away. We're going on tour.
We had a HUGE turnout in The Villages, Florida, and we had the honor of having [Marjorie Taylor Greene](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bUBXhug7pLwXvpUH7lpxIZDTXWOApKXwjzUjyxUmWyHk3JNzGoJPbIOpSFPpjrbJgaMDpNtWurSwrJLjGSGPPdOVRcUZOlB-n1zQ9ovFpQg0jeU_8lF4sAE4U-JAuu6KZ1xL2_jxMpf0pjE9mAKS-Uo1KCxPsOZ9SuStTmUU68gqN71DeA4Xzw==&c=j6DXrErkx4nLuC1oUolGU4CCbLCYPxD-BYTGgyepl-PntO45-5xENA==&ch=Y07V2hotRseHqFv4ZtCRHFHJOtNSxXDrPcP9YV9uyY67PdYc3tunxw==&jrc=1) at the rally. She has been a dedicated fighter and is helping me elect America-First Republicans across the nation.
Big government, big media, big tech, they would all breathe a sigh of relief if Marjorie Taylor Greene and I were no longer in Congress fighting for you. They lie about us because we tell the truth about them.
If you missed it, I had some strong words for the Swamp and anyone who wants to dismiss us!
---

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Hello Somebody!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
Nina Turner has committed her life to advancing progressive change.
#

_Hello Somebody!_
**I’m endorsing Nina Turner in Ohio’s 11th Congressional District, and throwing the weight of Policy is Personal PAC behind her to ensure she wins.**
On the Cleveland City Council, in the Ohio State Senate, and as National Co-Chair of Sen. Bernie Sanders' 2020 presidential campaign, Nina has committed her life to advancing progressive change — and I need her fighting alongside me in Congress.
**[Nina is running in a crowded primary and voting starts in less than 2 months, so she needs to fight to get her message out across her district. Please split a donation between our campaigns today. Anything you can afford to give will immediately be put to use to help Nina win.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28999658/284996800/758090140?refcode2=ef876773-6ab2-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&refcode=em210511-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjg3Njc3My02YWIyLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3_zjs1_9jpQKdk_Kfuwe4iY8sDesORCX1WDfApKDK3o=)**
This movement is no stranger to making history, and Nina has made plenty of it. She was the first African-American woman to represent Ward One on Cleveland City Council and the first woman to serve as a state senator in Ohio’s 25th District.
In the state senate, Nina repeatedly defended against attacks on women’s healthcare freedom, partnered with organized labor to protect collective bargaining rights, and led the effort to create Ohio’s first task force on police and community relations to end racial profiling and police brutality.
Nina knows what it’s like for working people in this country, because she grew up the oldest of seven children to working-class parents in Northeast Ohio. We have gone far too long with a system that only delivers for the wealthy and well-connected, and Nina and I will fight relentlessly to build an America committed to racial, social, economic, healthcare and environmental justice.
**[Please, could you split a donation between our campaigns today to help send Nina to Congress and keep me there fighting for progressive priorities?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28999660/284996804/758090140?refcode2=ef876773-6ab2-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&refcode=em210511-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjg3Njc3My02YWIyLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3_zjs1_9jpQKdk_Kfuwe4iY8sDesORCX1WDfApKDK3o=)**
Thank you so much for your support. With Nina in Washington fighting alongside me, we can create revolutionary change for working people.
Onward,
Mondaire
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28999662/284996808/758090140?refcode2=ef876773-6ab2-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&refcode=em210511-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjg3Njc3My02YWIyLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3_zjs1_9jpQKdk_Kfuwe4iY8sDesORCX1WDfApKDK3o=)**

subject: 🚨Donald Trump just endorsed Glenn Youngkin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29000196/284999030/-2023814932?refcode=20210511_TM_5TE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2EyMGQzMS02YmIyLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zHxV-2zlZLMltOg9O16iPaBv9rAMCzJf7T97JXAFcbg=)

| | Derek,

Last night, Glenn Youngkin became the Republican nominee for Virginia Governor. And moments ago, Donald Trump endorsed him in an email to his millions of supporters, calling Glenn a “Patriot.”

**Derek, this is a crisis moment for Virginia’s future.**

[**I’m asking you directly to rush a contribution to my campaign so we can have the resources to stop Donald Trump and Glenn Youngkin. We can’t let Trump’s hand-picked candidate become the next Governor of Virginia.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29000197/284999031/-2023814932?refcode=20210511_TM_5TE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2EyMGQzMS02YmIyLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zHxV-2zlZLMltOg9O16iPaBv9rAMCzJf7T97JXAFcbg=)

Trump’s glowing endorsement isn’t surprising to anyone paying attention -- Youngkin spent his entire primary campaign sucking up to Trump. Like Trump, he made voter suppression the focus of his campaign.

I have news for Trump and Youngkin -- stopping people from voting isn’t “patriotic,” it’s disgusting and anti-democratic.

Derek, Glenn Youngkin already bought himself the Republican nomination for Governor. With Donald Trump and his extremist army behind him, the threat that Youngkin poses to Virginia’s progress is unlike anything Virginia has seen in a generation.

We fought too hard to defeat Donald Trump to let Glenn Youngkin bring Trumpism to Virginia through the back door.

[**Please, contribute anything you can to my campaign right now -- we can’t let Glenn Youngkin roll back our progress and bring Trumpism to Virginia.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29000198/284999032/-2023814932?refcode=20210511_TM_5TE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2EyMGQzMS02YmIyLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zHxV-2zlZLMltOg9O16iPaBv9rAMCzJf7T97JXAFcbg=)

Game on,

Terry | [DONATE >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29000199/284999033/-2023814932?refcode=20210511_TM_5TE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2EyMGQzMS02YmIyLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zHxV-2zlZLMltOg9O16iPaBv9rAMCzJf7T97JXAFcbg=)

We are going to turn Tennessee Blue in 2022 and finally be done with Bill Lee but we need to make sure we’re meeting these goals if we are going to pull it off. Will you make a donation right now and help us? [] [] Thank you, Hendrell Remus [] Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party [] P.S. Please, only donate if you can afford to. The impacts of this pandemic are real, and we completely understand if times are tough right now. PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, CAROL V. ABNEY, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. CONTRIBUTIONS OR GIFTS TO TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE. Tennessee Democratic Party 319 Plus Park Blvd Nashville, TN 37217 United States

Friend,
People don’t want to know whether Pennsylvania’s next Senator prefers Sheetz or Wawa.
They want to know one thing — whether or not that person is going to fight for them.

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: Take Action to Protect Voting Rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
Fair Fight |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29005929/285012035/1793776944?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmM4NzY1MC03M2IyLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qKaX_iDyCorZM17k3dz-6dR45PC2TRpMtCrGMiDTQgg=&emci=5d831d9d-6fb2-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=9fc87650-73b2-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=1037277)

| | Friend - Right now, in states across the country, our democracy is under attack - a coordinated assault on voting rights by Republican legislators that only increases the urgency for federal voting rights protections. Now is the moment for all of us to take action to defend our sacred right to vote, and to fight back against anti-voter bills in state legislatures across the country. Today, over 360 bills have been filed in state legislatures that would restrict voting access and curtail voters’ freedoms - bills like those in Arizona, which would gut their extremely popular and effective Permanent Early Vote List; a proposal in Texas to greatly empower partisan poll watchers with greater and closer access to voters, prohibit election officials from proactively mail ballot applications to all voters, and set new penalties for election officials who provide assistance to voters; legislation in Michigan removing the right to return a mail ballot to a drop box after 5pm the day before Election Day, and more. Some anti-voter bills, such as SB 202 in Georgia and SB 90 in Florida, have already been signed into law. However, your voices are slowing this flood of anti-voter legislation, and have helped to protect voting access from Republican attacks. In New Hampshire, Republicans were forced to give up on a bill that would confuse student voters and harm the university system by standing up new residency requirements. In Georgia, provisions that would have removed no-excuse absentee voting, eliminated Sunday early voting, and ended automatic voter registration were removed before SB 202 was signed into law. In West Virginia, a bill that would have shortened early voting and accessibility failed before the session ended. Without your calls, social media, and safe in-person advocacy, voters would have been much worse off. But make no mistake: To protect the freedom to vote for all eligible Americans, this moment demands that we pass federal legislation that safeguards the right to vote.[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29005930/285012036/2100491935?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmM4NzY1MC03M2IyLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qKaX_iDyCorZM17k3dz-6dR45PC2TRpMtCrGMiDTQgg=&emci=5d831d9d-6fb2-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=9fc87650-73b2-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=1037277)**[I am asking you to take action today to call on your US Senators to pass the For the People Act, a crucial bill that can blunt these relentless attacks and protect access to the ballot for all.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29005931/285012037/2100491935?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmM4NzY1MC03M2IyLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qKaX_iDyCorZM17k3dz-6dR45PC2TRpMtCrGMiDTQgg=&emci=5d831d9d-6fb2-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=9fc87650-73b2-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=1037277) ** **Find your Senators’ contact information[here,](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29005932/285012038/2100491935?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmM4NzY1MC03M2IyLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qKaX_iDyCorZM17k3dz-6dR45PC2TRpMtCrGMiDTQgg=&emci=5d831d9d-6fb2-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=9fc87650-73b2-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=1037277) and call now to ask that they support the urgent passage of the For the People Act to protect our democracy. Once you have called, share with your networks and friends to ask them to do the same.** No matter where you live, no matter if you have called before or never done so, and no matter who your Senator is, it’s crucial that they hear from you on the importance of federal action on voting rights. Together, we can get good done and ensure the freedom to vote is protected across the country. Thank you, and let’s get it done. Stacey Abrams Founder, Fair Fight Action Fair Fight Action
1270 Caroline Street, NE
Suite D120-311
ATLANTA, GA 30307
United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/5d831d9d-6fb2-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef/9fc87650-73b2-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmM4NzY1MC03M2IyLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qKaX_iDyCorZM17k3dz-6dR45PC2TRpMtCrGMiDTQgg=&id=102485538). |

name: DJ Burke
subject: Help us secure another victory in the House of Representatives!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
We can't afford to send another radical Democrat to Concord
[](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnh-gop%2Fspecial-election-fund/1/010001795b61df63-b1624c0a-daa3-42a9-9b14-336b82f61223-000000/MaMhn9CnjVmUKs36aNwlkXDe1Mw=213)

Derek,

We are only four weeks away from our next special election in New Hampshire. We need your help to support our Republican candidate Chris Lins and secure another victory for New Hampshire Republicans. We have the opportunity to build on the momentum built in 2020 and continued last month with our victory in Merrimack. This time, we can flip a seat that was previously held by a Democrat and add another Republican vote to the NH House of Representatives. Our House Majority is the slimmest it’s ever been and each and every vote is critical as we look towards passing vital legislation that expands School Choice and reduces burdensome regulations in the near future.
Chris Lins is a strong candidate, and well deserving of your support. Chris is a great leader, steadfast defender of the New Hampshire Advantage, and two time cancer survivor. Chris will be an advocate for sensible spending, defender of our constitutional rights, and supporter of New Hampshire businesses.
On the contrary Chris’ opponent, Democrat Muriel Hall, is happy to promote her radical agenda. According to her own website, her top priorities are increasing taxes, preventing families from having any influence over their children’s education, and defending corrupt unions. Nowhere on her website does she mention sensible spending, or advocate for our small businesses owners. She is a voice for big unions and big government, not a defender of the New Hampshire way of life.
We cannot afford to send another out-of-touch leftist to Concord, especially when our majority is so slim. With your help we were successful in the recent Merrimack special election, and we can be again in Bow - Dunbarton. Despite Democrats spending tens of thousands of dollars on the Merrimack election, when all votes were counted, the Republican candidate came out on top. They will undoubtedly try to do the same again in Bow - Dunbarton, and that is why we need your support. We cannot simply let the Democrats spend their way to victory.
Please show your support for Chris Lins, and help us secure another Republican victory in the Bow - Dunbarton Special Election. Election day is June 8th, please make a contribution before it is too late.

\- D.J. Burke, NH GOP Finance Director
[Please make a Donation Today!](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnh-gop%2Fspecial-election-fund/2/010001795b61df63-b1624c0a-daa3-42a9-9b14-336b82f61223-000000/sfvBgM-Q1e04YQZ8VRGm1D14GUI=213)

**P.S.**
The Bow - Dunbarton special election for State Representative is only four weeks away, and we need your help to secure a victory. The Democratic candidate wants to raise your taxes, prioritize big unions over small business, and stop parents from having a say in their children’s education. We cannot afford to send another radical Democrat to Concord. With your support, we secured a victory in the Merrimack special election. We need your help to do so again!

[Donate Here!](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnh-gop%2Fspecial-election-fund/3/010001795b61df63-b1624c0a-daa3-42a9-9b14-336b82f61223-000000/qu2TrsMOmcHRsZ-L80QFrzmlJ6U=213)

Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee. Not Authorized by any Candidate or Candidate's Committee

clean_body: We can't afford to send another radical Democrat to Concord Derek, We are only four weeks away from our next special election in New Hampshire. We need your help to support our Republican candidate Chris Lins and secure another victory for New Hampshire Republicans. We have the opportunity to build on the momentum built in 2020 and continued last month with our victory in Merrimack. This time, we can flip a seat that was previously held by a Democrat and add another Republican vote to the NH House of Representatives. Our House Majority is the slimmest it’s ever been and each and every vote is critical as we look towards passing vital legislation that expands School Choice and reduces burdensome regulations in the near future. Chris Lins is a strong candidate, and well deserving of your support. Chris is a great leader, steadfast defender of the New Hampshire Advantage, and two time cancer survivor. Chris will be an advocate for sensible spending, defender of our constitutional rights, and supporter of New Hampshire businesses. On the contrary Chris’ opponent, Democrat Muriel Hall, is happy to promote her radical agenda. According to her own website, her top priorities are increasing taxes, preventing families from having any influence over their children’s education, and defending corrupt unions. Nowhere on her website does she mention sensible spending, or advocate for our small businesses owners. She is a voice for big unions and big government, not a defender of the New Hampshire way of life. We cannot afford to send another out-of-touch leftist to Concord, especially when our majority is so slim. With your help we were successful in the recent Merrimack special election, and we can be again in Bow - Dunbarton. Despite Democrats spending tens of thousands of dollars on the Merrimack election, when all votes were counted, the Republican candidate came out on top. They will undoubtedly try to do the same again in Bow - Dunbarton, and that is why we need your support. We cannot simply let the Democrats spend their way to victory. Please show your support for Chris Lins, and help us secure another Republican victory in the Bow - Dunbarton Special Election. Election day is June 8th, please make a contribution before it is too late. \- D.J. Burke, NH GOP Finance Director P.S. The Bow - Dunbarton special election for State Representative is only four weeks away, and we need your help to secure a victory. The Democratic candidate wants to raise your taxes, prioritize big unions over small business, and stop parents from having a say in their children’s education. We cannot afford to send another radical Democrat to Concord. With your support, we secured a victory in the Merrimack special election. We need your help to do so again! Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee. Not Authorized by any Candidate or Candidate's Committee NHRSC 10 Water Street, Concord, NH 03301 | 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire 03301 United States of America |

name: Mike Espy
subject: An exciting new campaign for health care

body:

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/29006831/285015542/797917113?refcode=espynatl_em0511&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmU4OTNjNi03NmIyLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8vgFt4qcmoExdqK36qV7Z2jQxXQyqdjfIkfQNCpSbm4=) _The Fairness Projects runs and wins people-powered ballot initiatives to expand health care, raise wages, and make real change in red and blue states. If you'd like to unsubscribe,[click here](https://email.everyaction.com/unsubscribeUnique/9566742c-dab1-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef/1fe893c6-76b2-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmU4OTNjNi03NmIyLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8vgFt4qcmoExdqK36qV7Z2jQxXQyqdjfIkfQNCpSbm4=&id=102101357)._ Hi friend, Mike Espy here. I ran for the U.S. Senate to be the health care senator because too many people across the country don’t have access to quality, affordable health care. _As you know, too often, partisan politicians get in the way, blocking real progress and performing political stunts instead of helping those in need._ **In my home state of Mississippi, the politicians in power have refused to expand Medicaid, even after the recent federal COVID relief bill made it an even better financial deal for us.** That’s why I’m so excited to share this great news with you today: **A new coalition called Healthcare for Mississippi is working to expand Medicaid in Mississippi at the ballot box, bringing the issue directly to voters to cut through the partisan noise and win real change.** **It’s going to be a tough fight. I’ve seen firsthand just how difficult it is to win here, and I know the special interests will try to block them. So I have to ask:** **[Can you make a contribution today to Healthcare for Mississippi to help kick-off this people-powered campaign for health care in my home state? It would mean so much to me and countless Mississippians.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/29006832/285015543/797917113?refcode=espynatl_em0511&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmU4OTNjNi03NmIyLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8vgFt4qcmoExdqK36qV7Z2jQxXQyqdjfIkfQNCpSbm4=) ** | **[Contribute →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/29006833/285015544/797917113?refcode=espynatl_em0511&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmU4OTNjNi03NmIyLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8vgFt4qcmoExdqK36qV7Z2jQxXQyqdjfIkfQNCpSbm4=)**
---
By some metrics, my home state of Mississippi is the least healthy state in our country.
**Yet the politicians who are supposed to represent us have ignored the health of our neighbors. They’d rather score political points than help those in need.**
That’s why I ran for the U.S. Senate and it’s why I’m still fighting for health care and justice for all.
And it’s why I’m particularly excited about the new Healthcare for Mississippi campaign. It’s supported by the great team at The Fairness Project, who’ve already won six Medicaid expansion campaigns like this one in red and purple states.
**They know how to win tough campaigns. But I know this may be one of their toughest campaigns yet. The special interests will spend big and those in power will try to stop us.**
That’s why we need your help to win healthcare for over 200,000 Mississippians.
**[Please, contribute to Healthcare for Mississippi today and become a founding donor of this exciting, people-powered campaign to win health care in my home state.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/29006834/285015546/797917113?refcode=espynatl_em0511&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmU4OTNjNi03NmIyLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8vgFt4qcmoExdqK36qV7Z2jQxXQyqdjfIkfQNCpSbm4=)**
**[Contribute →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/29006836/285015547/797917113?refcode=espynatl_em0511&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmU4OTNjNi03NmIyLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8vgFt4qcmoExdqK36qV7Z2jQxXQyqdjfIkfQNCpSbm4=)**
---
Together, with your help, Mississippi will win Medicaid expansion at the ballot box and send a clear message that Americans everywhere, even in red states, want more health care, not less.
Let’s get it done.
Mike Espy
_ _
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/29006838/285015549/1100783424?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmU4OTNjNi03NmIyLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8vgFt4qcmoExdqK36qV7Z2jQxXQyqdjfIkfQNCpSbm4=&emci=9566742c-dab1-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=1fe893c6-76b2-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=561582) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/29006841/285015551/-1451982884?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmU4OTNjNi03NmIyLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8vgFt4qcmoExdqK36qV7Z2jQxXQyqdjfIkfQNCpSbm4=&emci=9566742c-dab1-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=1fe893c6-76b2-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=561582)

Paid for by The Fairness Project. Thank you for supporting The Fairness Project. Your unwavering support helps us bring economic fairness to millions of Americans and put power directly in the hands of voters through ballot initiatives. The Fairness Project has won 20 ballot initiatives since 2016, changing the lives of nearly 18 million people by raising the minimum wage, expanding access to health care, capping payday lending, and winning paid leave. And we're just getting started. name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: We need to talk about “woke” corporations
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
I am sick and tired of these hypocritical corporations pretending to be woke.
|
---
| | |
Friend,

I am sick and tired of these hypocritical corporations pretending to be woke. They act as if they hold themselves in high moral regard, but in reality, all they care about is caving to the liberal mob and making a short-term buck.

Very few people in the United States Senate have been a harsher critic of "woke capital" than Marco Rubio. Time and again, he has called out their hypocrisy and let it be known that their far-left agenda does not have any place in this great country.

_First, Marco called out Delta for condemning Georgia 's Voter ID laws while they partnered with Communist China, which doesn't even hold elections.

Then, he called out MLB for moving their All-Star game out of Georgia due to the new Voter ID laws... while also partnering with Communist China.

Most recently, in an op-ed, he pointed out these "woke" Big Tech businesses will cancel conservatives -- like my father, President Trump -- for simply supporting traditional conservative values._

**Don 't let hypocritical corporations cancel you OR me. We need Marco to continue fighting for our conservative voices, but he needs our help!**

---
| | [KEEP MARCO IN THE FIGHT >>](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001L3wzxCIxr54aNQtGD2ZgsrN-MhvSUzkP3c8l183VnVFfqqoGtKqrCbdrYec-nCSH7BD4xHTjSQjwydu1yv4UXKO6inpwtaupbIVV2XCOQqMYxByqwS-_k0Z3q4IwvO1wq2_KgWSdTTzYMWIUrj5f0kHoRMS6v5mfKWKVZB3T1vIFJo72PbtmTGI3MirSPkbngASanOoAPklHXdRAEZa6lLXHzM3f1aDfG_uuuaM1nnLKlvAK3mghA2judyUnjuz4ULoSyXOgAV4Go1GxTxfrAA74SzvWbzmebZ8K3yi3dqkp9_HddvynOKyTFKBjx8AevAPm1uIl0Bng5BxFa9_wsMBQPeR87L2wSNZ5X61IlHo0OVETqChqXowWWtsiS73AHc0AAs0zJC_-OytlpOOptxNZytG9Hyw1Ot695rKjN1Ocov-MQpSCMVyBLCglBsZ_1ilogHShiE1NX7SmDVP_N4bPPdot2HSR&c=XiHgeyvKA6Oyetp49Aw-4KcJPKpGIvIU9DJBeEPpdTpA6tU9xc9BNg==&ch=ljMfv95H3XoY8wBZvC9MGAb2ShhEf0aOnbC8G1yUKQ0DYR1_wN3dBQ== "KEEP MARCO IN THE FIGHT >>")
---

These billion-dollar companies believe they are invincible, but we must let them know: they CANNOT choose to do business with Communist China and IGNORE China's spying, oppression, and mistreatment of their own people - All while smugly lecturing the rest of us.

And that's why we need to stand with Marco. He's not afraid to stand up to them, so China banned and sanctioned him. That's right, they literally canceled him in China. Don't let them cancel him here.

---

Thank you,
Donald Trump Jr.

clean_body: I am sick and tired of these hypocritical corporations pretending to be woke. | | | | Friend, I am sick and tired of these hypocritical corporations pretending to be woke. They act as if they hold themselves in high moral regard, but in reality, all they care about is caving to the liberal mob and making a short-term buck. Very few people in the United States Senate have been a harsher critic of "woke capital" than Marco Rubio. Time and again, he has called out their hypocrisy and let it be known that their far-left agenda does not have any place in this great country. First, Marco called out Delta for condemning Georgia 's Voter ID laws while they partnered with Communist China, which doesn't even hold elections. Then, he called out MLB for moving their All-Star game out of Georgia due to the new Voter ID laws... while also partnering with Communist China. Most recently, in an op-ed, he pointed out these "woke" Big Tech businesses will cancel conservatives -- like my father, President Trump -- for simply supporting traditional conservative values. Don 't let hypocritical corporations cancel you OR me. We need Marco to continue fighting for our conservative voices, but he needs our help! | | == "KEEP MARCO IN THE FIGHT >>" These billion-dollar companies believe they are invincible, but we must let them know: they CANNOT choose to do business with Communist China and IGNORE China's spying, oppression, and mistreatment of their own people - All while smugly lecturing the rest of us. And that's why we need to stand with Marco. He's not afraid to stand up to them, so China banned and sanctioned him. That's right, they literally canceled him in China. Don't let them cancel him here. | | == "HELP MARCO CALL OUT THE WOKE MOB" Enough is enough, Friend. This "woke" hypocrisy must end. subject: For your eyes only
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McMorris Rodgers Win The Future Fund
body:
Nancy Pelosi and her ultra-liberal coalition have repeatedly shown us now that they will not make the effort to work with Conservatives in Congress to address the needs of the American people.

_****_

*****This memo is intended for your eyes**** only*****

** **Confidential: For Committed Conservatives Only****

Attn: Top GOP Patriots
Re: House Democrats' Fundraising numbers

**My jaws dropped to the floor when I saw that Nancy Pelosi has helped House Democrats by raising $30 million off their radical agenda in just 3 months to start 2021.** The ultra-Left has continued to pour money into the Democrats' campaigns at a shocking rate.

Democrats will keep fighting tooth and nail to prevent us from taking back the House. With only 5 seats separating Republicans from firing Speaker Pelosi, Dems are willing to empty their multi-million-dollar war chests to keep their candidates in power.

**It has become clear to me that top patriots & large grassroots support are needed immediately, or we risk letting go of the momentum from our recent wins in the House. Friend,

Arbitrary lockdowns are anti-science, ignoring the effectiveness of the vaccine. That's why I just ended COVID restrictions and banned vaccine passports in Florida. Democrats' restrictions have become mechanisms to justify their thirst for control of our lives.

That's why I'm fighting to keep the government in check because businesses should be able to operate, kids should be in school, and people have a right to earn a living.

name: Josh Hawley
subject: I Will NOT Apologize
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE**
body:
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57361699:JgIYiNl_N:m:1:3103520637:DDDCEE9A5E1B65FD79F9778EF7A0EB06:r "Headline") Peter, It is rare for me to agree with CNN, but they are right: I am not sorry, and I will not apologize. **_I will not apologize_** for standing up for the integrity of our election system. **_I will not apologize_** for standing up to Big Tech companies that believe they, and they alone, can decide who is free to speak and who is not--if you, President Trump, or I should be canceled for our views. **_I will not apologize_** for questioning why Joe Biden thinks he can tell us when to leave our homes, go to work, go to church, or if we need to wear 1 or 2 masks. [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57361699:JgIYiNl_N:m:1:3103520637:DDDCEE9A5E1B65FD79F9778EF7A0EB06:r "Democrats")The Democrats, and the media, are so out of touch with the American people that they cannot FATHOM why I will NEVER apologize for standing up to Joe Biden's tyranny. **[NO MORE. We must resist the elites of this nation who mock us at cocktail parties while stifling our rights as Americans. They must be stopped.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57361699:JgIYiNl_N:m:1:3103520637:DDDCEE9A5E1B65FD79F9778EF7A0EB06:r "NO MORE. We must resist the elites of this nation who mock us at
cocktail parties while stifling our rights as Americans. They must be stopped.")** I don't work for Joe Biden; _I work for the people of Missouri. So, when Chuck Schumer starts rushing to pass Biden 's radical agenda before this Memorial Day, you can be assured I will be fighting them with every fiber in me._
* _Trillions of dollars for liberal pet projects_
* _Defunding the police_
* _Amnesty for 11 million illegal aliens_
* _Abolishing gun rights_
* _DC Statehood_
* _Rigging our elections_

I'm not here to compromise on my principles, and that's why I refuse to play the game like the rest of the Swamp. I don't cow-tow to them, Big Tech, or the Establishment, which has made me a major target. **They are all afraid of me because they cannot shout me down. They cannot intimidate me.** They tried to cancel my book, but I found another publisher to share my clarion call about the threat our nation faces from a monopolistic Big Tech sector and other Big Corporations who pull the strings in our nation's capital. They are trying to threaten my seat in the Senate, but fortunately, great patriots like you are writing and donating regularly, and hundreds of voters are showing up to every event to greet me when I go home. That kind of support lets me know I'm on the right track as I fight socialism on Capitol Hill. It's also the kind of support that is driving the left crazy. **[Will you please make your most generous contribution so I have what I need to keep going? Any amount, from $5 to the Federal Maximum of $2,900, is greatly appreciated.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57361699:JgIYiNl_N:m:1:3103520637:DDDCEE9A5E1B65FD79F9778EF7A0EB06:r "Will you please make your most
generous contribution so I have what I need to keep going? Any amount, from $5 to the Federal Maximum of $2,900, is greatly appreciated.")** They're going to come after me with everything they have. It's not a matter of "if," it's just a matter of "when," _and I need your help._ **[Are you with me?](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57361699:JgIYiNl_N:m:1:3103520637:DDDCEE9A5E1B65FD79F9778EF7A0EB06:r "Are you with me?")** For America,
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57361700:JgIYiNl_N:m:1:3103520637:DDDCEE9A5E1B65FD79F9778EF7A0EB06:r "Josh Hawley")
Josh Hawley
U.S. Senator, Missouri | | [STAND WITH JOSH](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57361699:JgIYiNl_N:m:1:3103520637:DDDCEE9A5E1B65FD79F9778EF7A0EB06:r "STAND WITH
JOSH")
---
| **PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE**

body:
Rate his presidency today!

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. clean_body: Here's the TRUTH: H.R. 1 doesn't just change election rules to stack the deck in Democrats' favor, it also mandates publicly funded campaigns. That means YOUR taxpayer dollars will be used to fill campaign war chests for candidates you DON'T support! ALERT: Senate Committee to Vote on H.R. 1 this week! Chuck Schumer is on track to keep his promise of sending H.R. 1 to President Biden's desk before August! We desperately need Patriots like YOU to step up and DEFEAT this disastrous bill. == | == == == ==: H.R. 1 doesn't just change election rules to stack the deck in Democrats' favor, it also mandates publicly funded campaigns. That means YOUR taxpayer dollars will be used to fill campaign war chests for candidates you DON 'T support! Our only hope of STOPPING H.R. 1 is with an overwhelming grassroots response. name: Maggie Hassan
subject: The GOP just announced their biggest attack ad buy so far
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello,
In just a moment, I'm going to ask you to chip in to my campaign. But first, let me explain why it's so important right now.
**Mitch McConnell 's dark money group just announced their biggest ad buy to date against me.**This week alone, they're spending six figures on attack ads in New Hampshire, with even more to come.
I won my last race by only 1,017 votes -- a 0.14% margin. Now, Republicans only need to flip ONE seat to take back control of the U.S. Senate, and these new attacks prove that I'm one of their top targets.
That's why I need your support today. I'm not counting on dark money super PACs to fund my campaign: I'm counting on grassroots supporters like you. [**Our team set a $25,000 emergency fundraising goal this week to fight back against these attacks. Can you chip in $3 or more today?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc809/2a380d31/263d6743/f00a51/3495260003/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDUxMV9hZGJ1eV9ybyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210511_adbuy_ro&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

When we're under attack this early, every dollar goes a long way.**[That's why I'm humbly asking today, can you please chip in $3 or whatever you can to protect New Hampshire's Senate seat -- and our Democratic majority?](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc809/2a380d31/263d6743/f00a51/3495260003/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDUxMV9hZGJ1eV9ybyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210511_adbuy_ro&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**

Now, Republicans only need to flip ONE seat to take back control of the U.S. Senate, and these new attacks prove that I'm one of their top targets. That's why I need your support today. I'm not counting on dark money super PACs to fund my campaign: I'm counting on grassroots supporters like you. "" If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. "" "" "" "" Moments like this are a real test of our campaign's strength. subject: Hoosiers should be proud!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
While other states are struggling, our leadership in Indiana has it under control. Read more >>

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful-470454?e=1acd9bb3d6)
https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/e-budget-week-1?utm_source=HouseFile&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=PG_INGOP_E_BudgetWeek1_051021&utm_agency=alpha&mc_cid=7f64cfc2c7&mc_eid=UNIQID

Hoosier Republican

Hoosiers have a lot to be proud of when it comes to our state finances.

For the ninth year in a row, our state legislature passed, and Governor Holcomb signed, a balance budget. The budget includes:
* A rainy-day fund to protect taxpayers and ensure that Indiana maintains a triple-A credit rating.
* Setting conservative spending levels to provide opportunities for future tax cuts and reforms.
* Funding priorities WITHOUT growing the government.
* Making key investments in education, infrastructure, workforce, and job creation.

While other states have struggled and have had to make drastic cuts, Indiana weathered the storm, and we’ve even come out of it shining!

And it’s thanks to our level-headed, Republican leaders, who always put people over politics, and aren’t held hostage by partisan power plays.

It is critical that we maintain this level of care in our elected officials, and not get complacent. The radical left is currently fundraising hard to try and bring a blue wave to our great state, and we cannot let that happen.

Please chip in what you can right now to keep our GOP leadership strong in Indiana!
CHIP IN $5 NOW >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/e-budget-week-1?utm_source=HouseFile&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=PG_INGOP_E_BudgetWeek1_051021&utm_agency=alpha&amount=5&mc_cid=7f64cfc2c7&mc_eid=UNIQID)

name: Ian Smith, Atilis Gym
subject: End illegal lockdowns >>
body:
---
| | | | | | | | **Peter,

Right now, Atilis Gym is I**N COURT fighting against New Jersey 's unconstitutional, tyrannical lockdown:********
****
******
* _Our_ attorneys just argued that **New Jersey showed ZERO data** to justify these lockdowns.
* The **prosecutors hemmed and hawed** , and couldn't even address the substance of our argument.
* So the **judge swooped in _to argue_** _in defense of the Governor._
******
********
**That 's NOT how a courtroom works, ****Peter**.** The judge is supposed to be an impartial adjudicator, not one of the state's enforcers.

**We have an uphill climb to WIN****this case,****END****illegal lockdowns, and****FREE****small businesses from the evils of our government.**

**_[Can I count on you to get us through this battle and help pay the insane legal fees to win this case for America's small businesses? Just $25 from freedom loving Americans like yourself will make all the difference.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57354836:J76d7NleN:m:1:3206719985:F1E3A085C69F4295406E9B56D208EE3E:r "Can I count on you to get us through this battle and help pay the insane legal fees to win this case for America’s small businesses? Just
$25 from freedom loving Americans like yourself will make all the difference.")_************
---
| | | [FIGHT BACK WITH $25](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57354837:J76d7NleN:m:1:3206719985:F1E3A085C69F4295406E9B56D208EE3E:r)

---
| It's been **over a year** since these **unconstitutional lockdowns** began, and even now as COVID-19 cases plunge, **there is no end in sight.**

In New Jersey, **1 in 3 small businesses** have had to **shut their doors for good**. The story's the same all around the country.
Let me be clear: _COVID_ did not kill these businesses. _Our governments_ did.

Last year, we refused to shut down our business without a fight. We've been fined and arrested. They've snatched money from our bank accounts. They've done **everything in their power to shut us down.**

But**they will NOT win this fight** and **they will NOT silence the American people.**
We need to **stand together** and fight back to save our nation, our communities, and our businesses. **_[Pitch in $25 to help us with our legal battle:](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57354837:J76d7NleN:m:1:3206719985:F1E3A085C69F4295406E9B56D208EE3E:r "Pitch in $25 to
help us with our legal battle:")_**

| Thanks for your help,

Ian

name: James Carville
subject: Trump's endorsement of Glenn Youngkin is a crisis for Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29012077/285034518/-2023814932?refcode=20210511_JC_5JCT&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGVjNWQyMy04NWIyLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JXOH_5PpY0rPOqM7tFT7iIYbckziKSqrjIJPtKcaQIU=)

| | Derek,

This is a crisis.

Glenn Youngkin just became the Republican nominee for Virginia Governor. And now Donald Trump is endorsing Glenn in an email he sent to millions of his supporters.

Trump is even calling Youngkin a “patriot” because Glenn is pushing the same sham voter suppression scam he is.

Derek, Donald Trump's brand of "patriotism" is not what Virginia needs. Glenn Youngkin is a dangerous Trump-backed extremist who wants to erase Virginia’s progress by bringing in Trumpism through the back door of the Governor’s office.

Terry has to beat him, and he needs our help.

**[Will you donate to Terry’s campaign right now so he has the resources to go toe-to-toe with Glenn Youngkin and Donald Trump.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29012078/285034519/-2023814932?refcode=20210511_JC_5JCT&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGVjNWQyMy04NWIyLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JXOH_5PpY0rPOqM7tFT7iIYbckziKSqrjIJPtKcaQIU=)**

This is about more than Virginia -- experts are saying Virginia’s governor’s race is 2021’s most important election.

It ain't hard to see why -- with Terry leading the charge, Virginia Democrats worked their hearts out to fire Donald Trump and elect Joe Biden.

And it worked.

But here’s the thing, with Trump getting into Virginia’s race, everything we fought for in 2020 is back on the line.

I want to be able to say we’re done with Trump’s era of hate and division. I want to be able to say that our democracy is strong and more people can vote, not less.

But we can’t do that unless Terry wins this thing. I’m counting on you to help make it happen.

**[Please, I’m asking directly, Derek. I need you to step up right now and rush a contribution to Terry’s campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29012079/285034520/-2023814932?refcode=20210511_JC_5JCT&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGVjNWQyMy04NWIyLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JXOH_5PpY0rPOqM7tFT7iIYbckziKSqrjIJPtKcaQIU=)**

Let’s beat this guy once and for all,

James Carville | [DONATE >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29012080/285034521/-2023814932?refcode=20210511_JC_5JCT&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGVjNWQyMy04NWIyLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JXOH_5PpY0rPOqM7tFT7iIYbckziKSqrjIJPtKcaQIU=)

name: Mike
subject: President Trump’s very own social media platform is LIVE!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
When Facebook decided to TOTALLY BAN President Trump they made a statement to the rest of the country.

_****_**🚨 'From the Desk of Donald J. Trump' is LIVE!🚨**

I have some historic news--**the launch of President Trump 's long-awaited and highly-anticipated social media platform is HERE. **
_****_
****[JOIN THE LAUNCH OF TRUMP'S SOCIAL MEDIA PLATFORM](https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/trumps-social-media-poll/?sc=pem51037m13m&utm_campaign=20210511_TY-2.101720_mike_t1062952-575&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210511_president-trumps-very-own-social-media-platform-is-live)****
---
**
'From the Desk of Donald J. Trump' is the takedown of Big Tech that those same Big Tech cronies have feared**--they knew they made a mistake in censoring President Trump and everyday Americans--**but rather than admitting their mistake, THEY DOUBLED DOWN with a highly publicized renewal of President Trump 's banishment.**

**[**JOIN THE LAUNCH OF TRUMP 'S SOCIAL MEDIA PLATFORM**](https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/trumps-social-media-poll/?sc=pem51037m13m&utm_campaign=20210511_TY-2.101720_mike_t1062952-575&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210511_president-trumps-very-own-social-media-platform-is-live)**
---

Now, the time has come--millions of Americans have already logged in to President Trump's new platform--and we want you there with us.

**Will you stand united with us, united with President Trump, united against censorship?** [**Stand with President Trump in the founding days of his social media platform.**](https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/trumps-social-media-poll/?sc=pem51037m13m&utm_campaign=20210511_TY-2.101720_mike_t1062952-575&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210511_president-trumps-very-own-social-media-platform-is-live)

**[**JOIN THE LAUNCH OF TRUMP 'S SOCIAL MEDIA PLATFORM**](https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/trumps-social-media-poll/?sc=pem51037m13m&utm_campaign=20210511_TY-2.101720_mike_t1062952-575&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210511_president-trumps-very-own-social-media-platform-is-live)**
---

Thank you patriot,

Mike

NRSC Deputy Digital Director

body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29013088/285037965/2005830277?refcode=20210511_TM_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTcxOWQ3ZC04OGIyLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JXB6UUQY2T18xWZ5iR3bpwpqH26s57rJI811xg-k9UM=) Friend, Today, the Senate Rules Committee will hold a markup of H.R.1, also known as The For the People Act—an expansive voting and elections bill that would enshrine voting rights for all Americans and expand access to the ballot box in the face of voter suppression from Republicans nationwide. Here’s what the For the People Act would do:
* End partisan gerrymandering
* Ensure automatic voter registration across the country
* Expand access to mail-in voting options
* Strengthen the Voting Rights Act

[**Before the Rules Committee meets, will you add your name to our petition to support the For the People Act?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29013089/285037966/-1682532084?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTcxOWQ3ZC04OGIyLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JXB6UUQY2T18xWZ5iR3bpwpqH26s57rJI811xg-k9UM=&emci=413d7d26-87b2-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=2e719d7d-88b2-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=194769) We’ve already seen outrageous election bills aimed at suppressing Democratic turnout in Republican-led states like Florida, Georgia, and Texas. They know that if Democrats continue building power and turning out our voters, we’ll keep winning elections. Now’s the time to stand up and fight for federal voting rights legislation and protect every American’s right to vote. Did you see this? Republicans in Arizona are advancing a new voter suppression bill to _purge over a hundred thousand names_ from the mail-in-voting list. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29014138/285042177/2116493782?refcode=em_fr_2021.05.11_b1_to_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTE4ZmRlYi04YmIyLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zyRPtVc718ttsU5PJ3zo3lWRslkiPL3o_SXVHanwXgI=) Arizona Republicans are doing everything they can to keep people from voting. Martin was the very first Democrat to represent this historically red district. _**Now, this seat could flip red again — and along with it, our margin in the House.**_
That’s why here on Team Heinrich, we’re all in for Melanie Stansbury. As a state legislator and lifelong New Mexican, she knows what our state needs to thrive, and she’ll work hard in Washington to get it done.
In the state legislature, she’s focused on ending childhood hunger, improving education, modernizing our electric grid, expanding economic opportunity, protecting public safety, and ensuring equal access to healthcare. We know she’ll fight for these issues and more in Congress.
**Melanie needs our help spreading the word and turning out the vote in these critical final weeks. So, we’re humbly asking — can you send a contribution of $10 or any amount to keep this seat blue?**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Crenshaw?=
subject: Tell Dan what you think
body:
Please take a minute to complete his Official Priorities Survey | |
---
| | | [ ](https://CrenshawforCongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=96cdb996364a2e23e221e200b&id=3c5ab52802&e=56fbdb3cc4)
---
| | | Peter-

Dan Crenshaw needs your help.

Without your input on the top priorities conservatives in Congress should be focused on this year, we won’t have a unified message that we can use to take back the House in 2022 and fire Speaker Pelosi.

[**That’s why we are asking you to please take a few minutes to complete the 2021 Official Priorities Survey which we put together for Dan.**](https://CrenshawforCongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=96cdb996364a2e23e221e200b&id=11ad4823d3&e=56fbdb3cc4)
---
| | **2021 OFFICIAL PRIORITIES SURVEY**

**EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com** **SURVEY STATUS: Incomplete**
| | [SHARE YOUR INPUT >>](https://CrenshawforCongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=96cdb996364a2e23e221e200b&id=8f12ab0e2b&e=56fbdb3cc4 "CHIP IN $15 >>")
---
| **Nancy Pelosi is using Joe Biden as her personal puppet to advance socialist policies into law to fundamentally change America.**

❌ Abolishing the police.
❌ Opening our borders.
❌ Green New Deal.
❌ Medicare For All.
❌ Packing the Supreme Court.

And every other radical leftist policy you can imagine.

**It’s only going to get worse if we don’t stop it. **

Fortunately, Dan Crenshaw's position on the House Energy & Commerce Committee puts him front and center in these policy debates. This committee has the broadest jurisdiction of any committee in the House of Representatives - with oversight of everything from health care and energy policy to telecommunications and interstate and foreign commerce.

When Democrats try to pass socialist policies like the Green New Deal or a government takeover of health care, they’ll have to go through the Energy and Commerce Committee first. **And they’ll have to go through Dan Crenshaw too. **

**Peter, your input is extremely valuable to Dan, and critical for planning a strategy to hold the line against the Radical Left in 2021.** With a unified voice, we have the best chance in history to take back the House and fire Nancy Pelosi once and for all.

[**Please do not wait to take the Official Priorities Survey and share your feedback on the most critical issues.**](https://CrenshawforCongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=96cdb996364a2e23e221e200b&id=227741e626&e=56fbdb3cc4)

Thanks for your support.

Team Crenshaw
---

name: Giffords.org
subject: Three things you need to know
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends -
A lot is you going on right now regarding gun safety. Here are three things you need to know:
1. The NRA is fighting tooth and nail to stop us from passing universal background checks in the Senate. And to make things worse, an NRA-backed Second Amendment case is also going to be heard before the Supreme Court for the first time since Justice Amy Coney Barrett was confirmed.
2. Universal background checks could be voted on any day now in the Senate. And here at Giffords, we are doing everything we can to make sure this legislation passes.
3. Your donation has a HUGE impact on whether or not we are able to hold off the NRA and successfully pass universal background checks.

[**So we need your help, friend. Can you make a $3 donation to Giffords PAC? We’ll put your contribution to work right away in our efforts to urge the Senate to pass universal background checks.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/2001?refcode=em210511-1-30&amount=3&t=1&akid=96%2E3935704%2EAMSR3l)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| [Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/2015?refcode=em210511-1-30&t=14&akid=96%2E3935704%2EAMSR3l) | [Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/2003?refcode=em210511-1-30&t=15&akid=96%2E3935704%2EAMSR3l)
---|---
[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/2004?refcode=em210511-1-30&t=16&akid=96%2E3935704%2EAMSR3l) | [Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/2005?refcode=em210511-1-30&t=17&akid=96%2E3935704%2EAMSR3l)
---|---
[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/2006?refcode=em210511-1-30&t=18&akid=96%2E3935704%2EAMSR3l) | [Other amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/1999?refcode=em210511-1-30&t=19&akid=96%2E3935704%2EAMSR3l)
---|---
The NRA has millions of dollars to spend and they will use it all to unravel the decades of progress we’ve made on gun safety measures that help save lives.
We may not have troves of dark money like the NRA, but we have you! And with your $3 donation, we can prove to Congress how many Americans are with us in this fight.
Thank you for standing with us. Together, we will pass universal background checks and eliminate the NRA’s influence over Congress once and for all.
Team Giffords
**[DONATE NOW](https://go.giffords.org/go/2001?refcode=em210511-1-30&t=20&akid=96%2E3935704%2EAMSR3l)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=21&akid=96%2E3935704%2EAMSR3l) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and Mark.

name: Candace Owens
subject: My interview with Donald Trump
body:

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29016782/285053131/-1287071472?refcode=210312_onboard&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWJiNGVmMC05M2IyLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0FwkqXXtIN1API4bYfhZqF_Ubk_iieyS3vWXhDr8YTM=) Derek, **I'm so fired up about the success of Team Samirah's weekend I just had to reach out!** Our team put together one of our biggest canvassing operations of the entire campaign thus far -- we had volunteers from across the district out to help us out on the doors to spread our message around the 86th District! **This is a multi-generational movement and we are perseverant and we will get this done. [**Would you help me out with a donation of $25 (or whatever you can afford) today so that we can keep building this grassroots team of supporters?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29016784/285053133/-1001649105?refcode=210511_weekendrecap&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWJiNGVmMC05M2IyLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0FwkqXXtIN1API4bYfhZqF_Ubk_iieyS3vWXhDr8YTM=) Running a people-powered progressive campaign has always been my main objective and thanks to supporters like you -- we've made it happen. **Now, let's keep up this momentum!** Talk soon,

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29017204/285055558/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjZkMmEwMC05NWIyLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wvs04waPkTckj0Iwt8rSan4bg0ecUDkJXaAMDFQGR8w=&emci=746d2a00-95b2-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=766d2a00-95b2-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=11385749)

Peter --

When I got my vaccine 2 weeks ago, I teared up a little. Not because of the jab (if you haven’t gotten yours yet -- trust me, you barely feel it).

I was thinking about the people in my life I’ll help protect. My daughters, my husband, my mother-in-law, and every single person I interact with every single day. And even all the folks in the grocery store and on the street who I haven’t met yet -- but who, once my vaccine has fully taken effect, I’ll be protecting.

**I got vaccinated for those I love, and those they love.**

Because of everyone in California who’s done their part and gotten the vaccine, California is reopening. L.A. and Ventura County are doing well -- with COVID rates trending down. **But we can’t let our guard down.** We’ve been in this pandemic long enough to know that the virus knows no borders and takes no partisan positions. Misinformation about vaccines, frustration with safety measures and uncomfortable masks -- these things only benefit the virus.

So, if you haven’t gotten your vaccine yet, please do your part to keep your own loved ones (and their loved ones, and their loved ones) safe from the virus.

**You can sign up for your vaccine appointment here:[https://covid19.ca.gov/vaccines](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29017205/285055559/73738954?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjZkMmEwMC05NWIyLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wvs04waPkTckj0Iwt8rSan4bg0ecUDkJXaAMDFQGR8w=&emci=746d2a00-95b2-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=766d2a00-95b2-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=11385749)**

Please do your part to keep us all safe -- and bring us closer to embracing our families and friends again.

Thanks,

Christy

P.S. -- Every time I see a syringe, I think of my mom, one of the most caring people I know, who spent her life working as a nurse. If there are health care workers, nurses, or doctors in your life -- I hope you will get vaccinated as soon as possible to honor everything they’ve done to end this pandemic.
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29017206/285055560/1412062207?refcode=em21_210511_covid-s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjZkMmEwMC05NWIyLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wvs04waPkTckj0Iwt8rSan4bg0ecUDkJXaAMDFQGR8w=)

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: All eyes on Arizona
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

**Breaking News:** Super PAC pledges to spend $10 million to defeat Mark Kelly in 2022 Senate race
_Chip in today to help hold this seat and keep Mark in the Senate!_
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?refcode=em210511-1-15&t=1&refcode2=582_6688874_vvOfLs&akid=582%2E6688874%2EvvOfLs)**
* * *
Friends —
National Republicans have made it clear that defeating us and taking back this seat is a top priority in 2022. They know our majority in the Senate is razor thin and all eyes are on Arizona to see if we can hold this seat.
We thought we were prepared for what was coming our way, but then a Super PAC pledged to spend $10 million to defeat us in next year’s Arizona Senate race.
So now, we know they aren’t bluffing. They are coming right for this seat and we have to organize and prepare now to defend it in 2022.
**We’re working around the clock to ramp up our efforts to help Mark hold this seat. It’s going to be a major undertaking, which is why we have to ask:**
[**If you are able, will you make a $3 donation to our people-powered campaign? We’ll put your donation right to work in our efforts to hold Arizona’s seat and keep Mark in the Senate.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?refcode=em210511-1-15&t=2&refcode2=582_6688874_vvOfLs&akid=582%2E6688874%2EvvOfLs)
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?refcode=em210511-1-15&t=3&refcode2=582_6688874_vvOfLs&akid=582%2E6688874%2EvvOfLs)**
Thank you in advance for chipping in and for helping us hold this seat. Your support will give us the ability to fight back against whatever National Republicans decide to throw at us as we gear up to run again in 2022.
You are a huge part of this team, we couldn’t do this without you!
Team Kelly
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?refcode=em210511-1-15&t=4&refcode2=582_6688874_vvOfLs&akid=582%2E6688874%2EvvOfLs)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=582%2E6688874%2EvvOfLs).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Colin McCann
subject: The experts are praising Derek's newest legislation. LEARN MORE:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/g6AZB3RZ4cpHVXivEVXXM92eC0S_Ifrb0m25AsA-OM8=/Gddx9AAGqep0Y66e-SGZFi9a3BGIlaJAE7ZFHIf_ThI=) **" How to help employers and those struggling to get into the workforce"** [READ DEREK'S OP-ED](https://act.myngp.com/el/g6AZB3RZ4cpHVXivEVXXM92eC0S_Ifrb0m25AsA-OM8=/Gddx9AAGqep0Y66e-SGZFi9a3BGIlaJAE7ZFHIf_ThI=)
---
| Peter,

Derek knows that long-term unemployment is a challenge that began long before the pandemic, but has gotten much worse. The numbers don't lie: 4.2 million Americans were experiencing long-term unemployment in March of 2021 -- a 3.1 million uptick since February of 2020.

The effects of this long-term unemployment crisis are devastating to families, potential workers, and our communities. Prolonged joblessness can lock workers out of the labor market and lead to lower wages.

Derek knows folks experiencing long-term unemployment aren't lazy. And he knows the misguided approach of opposing unemployment benefits won't solve this long-term unemployment crisis.

**[Instead, Derek has proposed a new solution: the Long-Term Unemployment Elimination Act. You can learn more about this new legislation by reading Derek's recent _Seattle Times_ op-ed.](https://act.myngp.com/el/g6AZB3RZ4cpHVXivEVXXM92eC0S_Ifrb0m25AsA-OM8=/Gddx9AAGqep0Y66e-SGZFi9a3BGIlaJAE7ZFHIf_ThI=)**

The Long-Term Unemployment Elimination Act would help generate work opportunities and get unemployed Americans **_back_** in the workforce. It would target local funding for transportation, child care, job readiness training, substance abuse treatment, and more.

The labor and workforce experts have praised Derek's legislation. Already it's been endorsed by the Service Employees International Union, the National Urban League, the United States Workforce Association, the National Skills Coalition, and a whole host of other organizations.

**Derek and labor organizations know that we need the Long-Term Unemployment Elimination Act now more than ever. Read more about Derek 's legislation, [then sign on now as a citizen co-sponsor of the Long-Term Unemployment Elimination Act.](https://act.myngp.com/el/g6AZB3RZ4cpHVXivEVXXM92eC0S_Ifrb0m25AsA-OM8=/0nwA6StaWMUDPgulNqkLasWKcvDUX4zFwfLhxJr7R8Y=?gpsid=50_115_18800&ms=em21_210511_Unempl_engg_gq_act__CM_ettx&refcode=em21_210511_Unempl_engg_gq_act__CM_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210511_Unempl_engg_gq_act__CM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)**

Thank you,

Colin

Colin McCann
Political Director
Derek Kilmer for Congress | [DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/g6AZB3RZ4cpHVXivEVXXM92eC0S_Ifrb0m25AsA-OM8=/hZ0We3fjosElJ1lqgiOFCfFmSRTfwzoF-UDOTYwxnoY=?gpsid=50_115_18801&refcode=em21_210511_Unempl_engg_gq_act__CM_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210511_Unempl_engg_gq_act__CM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)
