body:
Unbelievable: She's not at the southern border.
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nIyt5RS8Bn8XYptK6V7dhTZcvjPaJJ58KGFP4o7loaBD4eKHAQWDksjOlbep3dK11xA3ieuRnaBZqZ0yoo_58oEpedgmqj7q0HAepjrO-fpsJ4ag3lvF2hmU_XgGcgvmhQbuLT6xamP9NbqnYKiB9uspCF4Ky4ssmPieWZxfiArIc77IJJy9qBPWM0ROPvfcdXVNpyesG_pI-tlDvW2VzW_VIdu111lJyt-ulOKGAZ1Bj3HzHSV310JBSTZ74h1nu5S93BNzb8B1apbNFwgpMEEmiwEaOhIpuXshorA72HrYeq6B9XqBRmG4mmKlwIoFNaJL5Z2bIT7oDWdr-ULAIiH-RYcLKBBVDt7O9AIBYPzPr_sYKg3RTBWAUJN555ir1OasTpncHp7hoxk38Wf-Fw==&c=JknLyq5ugZPVrYU7KQefcMGmOchp7qlgZmEdEGzhzTeZytnUppsqAg==&ch=5jyl58_1EilAphDyrcfqaOyEgfgrDprx3K_tWxClCEZvs69EZssXtw==)
Hi Friend, have you heard from Joe or Kamala about securing our Southern Border? _Neither have we._ The fact is, Friend, as the crisis at the border continues to worsen, Joe Biden and Kamala Harris remain silent on the issue. Democrats still will not accept that their partisan policies are the stem of the U.S. immigration problem. **[**SECURE OUR BORDER**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nIyt5RS8Bn8XYptK6V7dhTZcvjPaJJ58KGFP4o7loaBD4eKHAQWDksjOlbep3dK11xA3ieuRnaBZqZ0yoo_58oEpedgmqj7q0HAepjrO-fpsJ4ag3lvF2hmU_XgGcgvmhQbuLT6xamP9NbqnYKiB9uspCF4Ky4ssmPieWZxfiArIc77IJJy9qBPWM0ROPvfcdXVNpyesG_pI-tlDvW2VzW_VIdu111lJyt-ulOKGAZ1Bj3HzHSV310JBSTZ74h1nu5S93BNzb8B1apbNFwgpMEEmiwEaOhIpuXshorA72HrYeq6B9XqBRmG4mmKlwIoFNaJL5Z2bIT7oDWdr-ULAIiH-RYcLKBBVDt7O9AIBYPzPr_sYKg3RTBWAUJN555ir1OasTpncHp7hoxk38Wf-Fw==&c=JknLyq5ugZPVrYU7KQefcMGmOchp7qlgZmEdEGzhzTeZytnUppsqAg==&ch=5jyl58_1EilAphDyrcfqaOyEgfgrDprx3K_tWxClCEZvs69EZssXtw==)** **[Ever since Joe Biden assumed office, illegal immigrants are crossing the border at an astoundingly high rate.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nIyt5RS8Bn8XYptK6V7dhTZcvjPaJJ58KGFP4o7loaBD4eKHAQWDksjOlbep3dK11xA3ieuRnaBZqZ0yoo_58oEpedgmqj7q0HAepjrO-fpsJ4ag3lvF2hmU_XgGcgvmhQbuLT6xamP9NbqnYKiB9uspCF4Ky4ssmPieWZxfiArIc77IJJy9qBPWM0ROPvfcdXVNpyesG_pI-tlDvW2VzW_VIdu111lJyt-ulOKGAZ1Bj3HzHSV310JBSTZ74h1nu5S93BNzb8B1apbNFwgpMEEmiwEaOhIpuXshorA72HrYeq6B9XqBRmG4mmKlwIoFNaJL5Z2bIT7oDWdr-ULAIiH-RYcLKBBVDt7O9AIBYPzPr_sYKg3RTBWAUJN555ir1OasTpncHp7hoxk38Wf-Fw==&c=JknLyq5ugZPVrYU7KQefcMGmOchp7qlgZmEdEGzhzTeZytnUppsqAg==&ch=5jyl58_1EilAphDyrcfqaOyEgfgrDprx3K_tWxClCEZvs69EZssXtw==) **The situation at our southern border is becoming dangerous for American civilians, border patrol agents, and even the migrants themselves; but still, _VP Harris remains silent._ [**Kamala Harris was tapped to head up immigration nearly 50 days ago, and still, she has refused to address the U.S. public or announce her plans. **](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nIyt5RS8Bn8XYptK6V7dhTZcvjPaJJ58KGFP4o7loaBD4eKHAQWDksjOlbep3dK11xA3ieuRnaBZqZ0yoo_58oEpedgmqj7q0HAepjrO-fpsJ4ag3lvF2hmU_XgGcgvmhQbuLT6xamP9NbqnYKiB9uspCF4Ky4ssmPieWZxfiArIc77IJJy9qBPWM0ROPvfcdXVNpyesG_pI-tlDvW2VzW_VIdu111lJyt-ulOKGAZ1Bj3HzHSV314-_43KhlWOnO1ZrjDiXqUDrNXtrSPu54oi-zEj3iBBViE08zom5xXk8687hLrPJbMKCDvF9dfZ74YcRwOqNWXMdgbw0gFp7z3eWBATIaKW4erkI2fVVrKdEVd0EjnlKhU8jueNJkmD-CwWn7SwRjBol8Q7kfkQedw==&c=JknLyq5ugZPVrYU7KQefcMGmOchp7qlgZmEdEGzhzTeZytnUppsqAg==&ch=5jyl58_1EilAphDyrcfqaOyEgfgrDprx3K_tWxClCEZvs69EZssXtw==) name: End the Filibuster via SarahforWisconsin.com
subject: The filibuster is how Mitch McConnell stops progress in the Senate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SARAH FOR WISCONSIN
body:
**Senator Mitch McConnell: "100 percent of my focus is on stopping this new administration."**
Mitch McConnell may not be the Senate majority leader anymore, but that hasn't stopped him from doing everything in his power to halt the Biden Administration's progress. His secret weapon? **The filibuster.**

**By abusing the filibuster, McConnell can continue to stall the passage of crucial legislation -- like the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act, the Violence Against Women Act, the For the People Act, the Equality Act, and more -- that have overwhelming public support.**

The Republican Party uses the filibuster as a tool to bring progress to a screeching halt. Sarah knows that if the Senate is going to make progress on the kitchen table issues Wisconsinites care about, we need to abolish the filibuster and allow the Senate to do its job.

[**We're calling on the Senate to abolish the filibuster to stop the uneven balance of power and end gridlock in Washington. This budget is transformative on every level and includes historic investments in job creation, education, and infrastructure –– but it wasn’t made... [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=0dd841e8056b46ffab40c95ecba79fb2&_e=BXCyWAFE23OHXWK-Qo3w6w9pX9w_ygSuJdgWq_cCAGfpHAl2LPXaQnOsxA-SSmqIfxZjJ05kdHktfdmiUDzfBPtY92rSwJ1nlB3C67OrLyzgvDW5W-d5gFgYhlrzmdZ5WOjazGlcM4ZUGK1cLkqp-DiPMYvsJWALW6r7pJ73WyTZk46YoCWtVXcNo4_6qTqHCvEnOL9KC8sxvRTemSGILVJHx5rMFfRc7OI1Pc8wq-SeRbpo-_PYlgs_TzFKjv3qr70WZhIECBJjqcjHBGj_Sp3eaKJz3MaqCb8KgTP2K1MZoUG3XL-gmbwehT_o3QEbOm3aw1axR_VM8KbAkbtalaCY-bPGK_5Z-5xLyq8GQb0qgdRyRagmcVvKEHEJ2ERLhJSeV79LdKQZ1ZMO0zlSMflugRHjJAh7dXWPytlFdnk_G6H8MMPZhnmTvtXJRcL9wUAgxuzVxQEtSOjNizW7MA%3D%3D) | |

Friend,

_Have you ever paid off a credit card or a loan that was holding you back from financial freedom?_

We’ve all been there.

It’s an incredible feeling –– and if you’re like most people, paying off that debt motivates you to continue making smart, conservative, forward-thinking financial decisions.

**That’s exactly what Governor Holcomb was thinking when he was working on Indiana’s recently signed budget.**

This budget is transformative on every level and includes historic investments in job creation, education, and infrastructure –– but it wasn’t made overnight.

Under Governor Holcomb’s leadership, Hoosiers have **never** seen a budget that was out of balance. Four straight years of conservative fiscal management brought us to this point, and we’re seeing more of that same common sense money management in this new budget, including:
[](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=0dd841e8056b46ffab40c95ecba79fb2&_e=BXCyWAFE23OHXWK-Qo3w6w9pX9w_ygSuJdgWq_cCAGfpHAl2LPXaQnOsxA-SSmqIfxZjJ05kdHktfdmiUDzfBPtY92rSwJ1nlB3C67OrLyzgvDW5W-d5gFgYhlrzmdZ5WOjazGlcM4ZUGK1cLkqp-DiPMYvsJWALW6r7pJ73WyTZk46YoCWtVXcNo4_6qTqHCvEnOL9KC8sxvRTemSGILVJHx5rMFfRc7OI1Pc8wq-SeRbpo-_PYlgs_TzFKjv3qvHA9sPpwW9EojIOLKPVDZUikM0ImrtYT07Bl1rdAgQ_9tIkkv9JuX5BnhwWBZKpGHEOOfp9pCwfgCwrcKRjqM32qcLoZ2kH0QFY90E30RhXizqf5SDonDKJNb2CfAClnVAHxbrxhd1V5BeAsHi7PgxbY7T5YEbS9J_ATrufjQJ1_9CdkvMm5Ed_EsG-loJa3rWBsLTUSQC6Oq7G78Gfh0w%3D%3D)

[**SHARE ON TWITTER**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=0dd841e8056b46ffab40c95ecba79fb2&_e=BXCyWAFE23OHXWK-Qo3w6xZ1jGQEONw_fM-oLZCmFdJQ1Jm3l2UUv0O7Sch7MRwiDpoM6_l8bXlicVYnZ0HFQGnFDJ0kCtj63MwVLZpl6JfCqViO6D9Kx2ZE5lkGxBgapZNgtMu6tu0bgSL-YtJzN3F3DyfnNsaGWXTQZNGo2O0nb28Wbs55FvQAmxhav8QkFb9nBbJJxiPdukV4CyasDVnKXws_cy5CU402u3aX7SQjDw02wEEHrViVvYlGqfXT88YgPzBryY-G_adAKLjTiULrAkVbFMY82OFxvczJb65iyEB3-oqcou8WVnveqZ5qwPP6C8g6O3ieSn8MT2RQveWkGrhTmrlz__VIo3_sKWag2m_T6Fw7rT7cuAtUOgySsJZjjQW2NPFkUy2H0qCbi1rO62ac8IheHIC1PQRx-HSPWP6wed6otqqOW7gLX2dJKFKkWIgxe-MAXQYscHV-mBMaTdBMm0d-3dDs3_lNlkps4jnaoSkUlW6gPHUvUs9P)
Governor Holcomb is paving the way for more future historic tax cuts, reforms, and investments that will make a major impact on Hoosier lives –– _even long after he leaves office!_

Thank you,

\- Holcomb Crew

Friend,

Today, Democrats are renewing their push to _ram_ H.R. 1 through the U.S. Senate.

H.R. 1 would put Democrats in charge of **our elections**. It would BAN voter ID. It would MANDATE ballot harvesting. And it would fund Democrat campaigns with YOUR tax dollars.

In other words -- H.R. 1 would give liberals **permanent and TOTAL power. **

I'm leading the fight to expose H.R. 1 for what it is -- a liberal power grab -- and to stop it in its tracks in the U.S. Senate. But time is running out; if we don't make a major push to stop H.R. 1 this week, it could come to pass. [**Will****you stand with me NOW? If H.R. 1 becomes law, America will never be the same and the game will be permanently rigged in favor of the Democrats.

I know you don't want that to happen, Friend. I know that Patriots like you believe in election security and common-sense voter ID laws. And I KNOW you don't want your tax dollars funding Elizabeth Warren, AOC, Maxine Waters, and Bernie Sanders' political campaigns.

**But it 's now or never to stop H.R. 1 from coming to pass, and I need Patriots like YOU to stand with me to show Democrats that I'm not alone in this fight. **

But it 's now or never to stop H.R. 1 from coming to pass, and I need Patriots like YOU to stand with me to show Democrats that I'm not alone in this fight. == I'm counting on you. In service, == Tom Cotton == == P.S. -- H.R. 1 is an unprecedented liberal takeover of our elections, and today Senate Democrats are renewing their push to force it into law.== | | | | | | Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane Suite 200 Little Rock, AR 72202 Senator Cotton was honorably discharged from the U.S. Army. | | Patriot, On Friday, I kicked off my America First Tour to send a strong message to the weak Establishment in both parties: **America First isn’t going away. We’re going on tour.**

We had a HUGE turnout in The Villages, Florida, and we had the honor of having [Marjorie Taylor Greene](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=333cfd18731548ea9fe23f246b62ce00&_e=0ZV8dT52EgWOS3tJTD05cyEjoCW3jMOzQaEq-RFnIpWeMHxZHugXKb57Q4KTbya0z2NQ0kmxrukbzQdF83K5zMX_oIEBVagJvJ1zavz0TMAPocJYrlrOVyeBt3s37MVHBIMqlHkN9qwXWAuqXHIHPPQRgP4W37nqA3vOWxATe-7QDh1VW_KVDgLoVpuCuin7y8Kan1NV-RpwzXRlA6H7AU-y4l3M_begtuQMlTsA35UrO_wps9arGiU6Je7OQuNz8vZ2jTDstrEk9i_p3Sx9-pOszf3IphtObxFhs5c2bxPcdE_qC1Fg9sXInX9ZQOUW4tgdcZGdqw4OXyXR2hrUOg%3D%3D) at the rally. She has been a dedicated fighter and is helping me elect America-First Republicans across the nation.

Big government, big media, big tech, they would all breathe a sigh of relief if Marjorie Taylor Greene and I were no longer in Congress fighting for you. **They lie about us because we tell the truth about them.**

name: Emma Carl
subject: could be bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor
body:
| | |

I just got out of a budget meeting and needed to send you a quick update as one of Jennifer’s strongest supporters.

As Jennifer’s Finance Director, my least favorite part of the job is sharing the bad news when we don’t have the funds to execute a strong strategic plan. This morning I needed to inform the team that there’s still too big of a budget gap to expand our media buy.

**I know Jennifer connected with you yesterday to share how critical this media buy expansion is. We still have until tomorrow to get the funds in the door.

[Remember, each dollar will have an impact in expanding Jennifer’s media buy where it will matter the most. We can put an end to this crisis

Friend, Our NATIONAL SECURITY IS AT STAKE! [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jz6L8a2aLt5qGk51vuW8_K3u3fBKvTc5CmAxYvKPkbV6sT1ec-4sR4wbjRX6P-OMtUMa2A6IqiMbY8sShXVur0INBKujs6oYT6wkIt-sT9jXmxQU1sDi3zyNiesiiNWI_9AnWGlOvJZAw3jpVEVyMfAnJDmFa8tFxFY2kT3qt-BVxc1LcxDom2wZPfAqHaWm_pqV1OI5-LslznHT-wiLRZgQPNuueThY48lsOkiAEyfrFBQXvBQ5WtGbPvgj0_T4NDz9-nGYAzww_Cxk5xrqbvqVGqfrFeUq18r1QGZ_QFc-2raTVqac5hSMYskiTT7jtx6W_gXDID42GR2jKUJTeIRUYXOLscOfT8y4O4g4_RFPqmk8bCxmLfAMYBgR935-OP_pq9KWsBLTPAQF2LhJpDZ-JyymMjwAy-B_hAkd8-7v3XYZM2KC4Fgn0zoOEY4uvyes9hJGXcc=&c=hAdl3eD_cbh33NCjzSlEmljPkcP71MQFkHPDTNjW6mfvB2FjHYJ_dQ==&ch=IAW6SHk96yDFeSnA93oB1_JDo7P_RHo3P_Rkz9FCFRS3dNP3TVV2ww==) Friend, Have you heard what's happening in the Virginia Governor's Race? The MOMENT that the Republican nominee for Governor was decided, the left started pumping in HUGE amounts of money into the race, making RIDICULOUS attacks, and going ALL OUT to defeat him. The left knows that Virginia is a bellwether for 2022, and they want to make sure it's a BLOWOUT for the Democrats. **Virginia is just the left 's first target though, Friend. They're prepared to do the exact same thing here in Iowa-- and they've already started by sending MILLIONS into Iowa to DEFEAT Kim Reynolds.** The left knows that Gov. My campaign is about empowering grassroots Americans like you, which is why I’m asking YOU to become a Founding Member of my Senate campaign. But with radical leftists and liberal RINOs in the swamp putting a target on my back, I need grassroots conservatives like YOU to help bring our campaign to victory. I know Terry will work tirelessly to stop those same extreme views across Virginia. = \-- Nancy Pelosi \---------- Forwarded Message ---------- From: Terry McAuliffe Subject: 🚨 Donald Trump just endorsed Glenn Youngkin Derek, Last night, Glenn Youngkin became the Republican nominee for Virginia Governor. And moments ago, Donald Trump endorsed him in an email to his millions of supporters, calling Glenn a “Patriot.” Derek, this is a crisis moment for Virginia’s future. = Trump’s glowing endorsement isn’t surprising to anyone paying attention -- Youngkin spent his entire primary campaign sucking up to Trump. Like Trump, he made voter suppression the focus of his campaign. I have news for Trump and Youngkin -- stopping people from voting isn’t “patriotic,” it’s disgusting and anti-democratic. Derek, Glenn Youngkin already bought himself the Republican nomination for Governor. With Donald Trump and his extremist army behind him, the threat that Youngkin poses to Virginia’s progress is unlike anything Virginia has seen in a generation. We fought too hard to defeat Donald Trump to let Glenn Youngkin bring Trumpism to Virginia through the back door. = Game on, Terry | = Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 31408 Alexandria, VA 22310 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click._ Paid for by Terry for Virginia

name: Josh Hawley
subject: The Jeff Bezos-owned Washington Post attacks me again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
The Washington Post published an article that attempts to smear me, but really they insult conservatives and small-town, middle America [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=153de8033f0a4340aa0aca5fd51691ee&_e=3SmqSaO-7CE5clnhui903fewsqaDT29IhPnYPLibhKeo49rscEM0uK_J6uz5chtYIGG9QEXTBLJVdJ4RLmipJV8VW-h5407tyuskAFQBwIahTcxvzQ1FNFFtxR7KNr1-BR7I6CHi5dudWymHUoYHenhW7SgHdCMvRu4KGF4oetVxKp7UdwUgptXS4bpvTqEFAJyNQQXPRix6SrBssZiUdagS0sa9bJS_VlLFAEaTUxBWtsXfP0hLQWFKyKtWSbjXwjcRfA9GZdeiYmtxHBLRdGNaNK_rlhlKl2MtZevp69-PlTUMDjlrdWn2uo2mgocFWE22-qJd62gAuFQVTv2KWxeVyF_OCCq8N_47WZVsdpaWt_Ty3qhYZpR6N1_w8b_cke0nFmt2gD8gsrU6MUggow%3D%3D) | |
---
Peter,
The hypocritical mainstream media is coming after me again.

The Washington Post published an article that attempts to smear me, but really, they insult conservatives and any of us who grew up in small-town, middle America.

**The Washington Post is owned by billionaire robber baron Jeff Bezos, whose big tech monopolies are directly in my crosshairs — is it a coincidence Bezos chooses to attack me?**

Remember a few weeks ago when the New York Times ran a story in which they tracked down an old prom date and my middle school principal to get them to say nasty things about me on the record?

They were met with universal scorn for their pettiness and total lack of journalistic standards.

They come after me because they know I’m right and they are working on borrowed time.
[_**SEND A MESSAGE TO THE LIBERAL MEDIA **_](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=153de8033f0a4340aa0aca5fd51691ee&_e=3SmqSaO-7CE5clnhui903fewsqaDT29IhPnYPLibhKeo49rscEM0uK_J6uz5chtYzkhG0XbtF2IwrWN5wejFyTIZGhgPqLlsLvOKhZwht5j4vl7rnFsy__o5wKFBp66DSf0EfZ4B1jhyeFUMPQ8aD0Ejn2c-x0Md7slf9gkMvaj9jD_I_oQ4dMc2vMnqFpCCdMyPrMZe06jnFCPQGRmyOZo1AQlsOGqN5zk3F02bK47M0hdJJeikgqKoISRPX0pRmpvbnRghjIHiUT_UkuN6rF1McwKeuwdVxW7EcKxKij47psV4KpUHLiJXR_HSfC3EGL26fpUPHZI8UBAXJBMLCV-GaefbEWJzKSp9DpJRMMKMUeIYU4RVl8D6tRt1C4Ap2tcr45Ek1OP7-qAFcV2l9Q%3D%3D)
**The big tech companies and outsized woke corporations have been operating with impunity— silencing, canceling, and shaming anyone who presents an alternate viewpoint.****
**

The media understands that the Democrat party pushes the agenda of big-tech, big-corporations and Hollywood, at the expense of regular, hard-working citizens.

I am working to break the left’s thought monopoly and make sure the average American worker has the opportunity to succeed in America without fear of being canceled for thinking contrary to the left.

**If you want to help stick it to the mainstream media, consider donating to my campaign. Every dollar I raise is evidence that the media's crusade against the truth is failing. **

clean_body: The Washington Post published an article that attempts to smear me, but really they insult conservatives and small-town, middle America | | Peter, The hypocritical mainstream media is coming after me again. The Washington Post published an article that attempts to smear me, but really, they insult conservatives and any of us who grew up in small-town, middle America. The Washington Post is owned by billionaire robber baron Jeff Bezos, whose big tech monopolies are directly in my crosshairs — is it a coincidence Bezos chooses to attack me? Remember a few weeks ago when the New York Times ran a story in which they tracked down an old prom date and my middle school principal to get them to say nasty things about me on the record? They were met with universal scorn for their pettiness and total lack of journalistic standards. They come after me because they know I’m right and they are working on borrowed time. The big tech companies and outsized woke corporations have been operating with impunity— silencing, canceling, and shaming anyone who presents an alternate viewpoint. The media understands that the Democrat party pushes the agenda of big-tech, big-corporations and Hollywood, at the expense of regular, hard-working citizens. I am working to break the left’s thought monopoly and make sure the average American worker has the opportunity to succeed in America without fear of being canceled for thinking contrary to the left. If you want to help stick it to the mainstream media, consider donating to my campaign. Every dollar I raise is evidence that the media's crusade against the truth is failing. Thank you, Josh Hawley P.S. If you want to join our team and be part of this movement, sign-up and donate to our campaign. Every dollar helps us fight the big-tech, big-corporation, elitist establishment who are hell-bent on keeping the status quo. | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate

Our elected officials here in Nevada place great importance on our schools and education systems.
As a member of the House Education and Labor Committee, Rep. Susie Lee (NV-03) introduced the Keep Our PACT Act, which would **invest hundreds of millions of dollars** in Nevada's schools annually.
And Gov. Steve Sisolak has made improving Nevada’s education system a **top priority.** He has supported increasing funding for public schools, expanding access to vocational education, and advocating for our teachers -- especially during the uncertainty of the pandemic.

name: Nancy Mace
subject: I’ve had enough of Dr. Fauci
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress |
body:
I don’t know about you, but I’m sick of hearing from Dr. Fauci. For far too long he’s been exalted by the media as the “expert” on the Coronavirus. [](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=a611cd33560046af8d6cb95279d5a229&_e=0YZisKVDh5iVHidTTtrMJcPoJcGZeUCu46zccn_FtTsITLt1N_dSumGuZJhzp6WqtGkmFX2ywtyamA1152c3ECKHVf12sdjFSRWsR7ul_MMv3Mm653r7IGi60MDqqXt3WA-5-FsJeUmIkHB4ZDa25Du88yDa3Nr2O_4ij1iLR2uyINOcqh9wRdjObvxMfqECdpXvT_MueO2pEr_B9dc_hWlSz2z2fcWnBE4TmnCWqzG0NcpvnRJaFh6meo7Y7jHIxW4CHHjA5lCm9ca7-FXvHOCIlUwQGvJJeTnS3jbnAlaJpM99KAqK3Yqf92C5orUfRxDuLnHF41ge2T7cCRQMZoXToVSl-VPcozyMyM7mEAHpfIlJCRYzY2x4eufkCrYENDXl3w59L0iNsdqpj2gqOdPIH6nu9WtiBvvoTdpKFaYRmSY6xFu6iFSVcSDrzHyy0E64m-VdZnzSFBySiZj-xsc-qGGEj8dMfZ9BhGYR5gU%3D) Friend, I don’t know about you, but I’m sick of hearing from Dr. Fauci. For far too long he’s been exalted by the media as the “expert” on the Coronavirus. Americans have been told to take his orders on everything. _When to open our schools. When to open our businesses. When to see our families._ Now, he wants every American to get the vaccine. But, if you do get the vaccine, you still have to live under his authoritarian lockdown rules. After a year + of this mess, I think Americans see what's been going on: Fauci LOVES the power the pandemic has given him, and he's not about to give it up. I want to help him out — by firing him now. [**FIRE FAUCI: SIGN THE PETITION**](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=a611cd33560046af8d6cb95279d5a229&_e=0YZisKVDh5iVHidTTtrMJcPoJcGZeUCu46zccn_FtTsITLt1N_dSumGuZJhzp6WqtGkmFX2ywtyamA1152c3ECKHVf12sdjFSRWsR7ul_MMv3Mm653r7IGi60MDqqXt3WA-5-FsJeUmIkHB4ZDa25Du88yDa3Nr2O_4ij1iLR2uyINOcqh9wRdjObvxMfqECdpXvT_MueO2pEr_B9dc_hWlSz2z2fcWnBE4TmnCWqzG0NcpvnRJaFh6meo7Y7jHIxW4CHHjA5lCm9ca7-FXvHM85e27XEg4dzh1-6i3QskPBETNYra7VmeTV9sHdx8MfJh3ykfPojRigZvf62F0OwE9XXkST6MDUqSIMxw7ZBKRa-22lHV1ABIcCCQt2TomWm5V29qXVV8kItq_KWZERtNElhxNGbfBKoRNHJ3zwazPGI65QPsg5Vg0TcX5qkjohyydIdagwSfe99o7_8lBgZtxFscVjGAR3636vtdrMsco%3D) The cost of Fauci's so-called advice during this pandemic is just too high. _Over the course of the last year:_
* The number of children needing mental health counseling jumped dramatically.
* Emergency rooms are seeing a 24% increase in mental health-related visits from children ages 5 to 11 compared to last year. (The increase among teens is even higher, reaching a staggering 31%.)
* Adolescent suicides are up by an estimated 17 million kids.
* Many children reliant on subsidized school lunches are at risk of going hungry.
* Academic success has dropped dramatically. In some parts of the country, failing rates have risen as much as sixfold, with Black and Hispanic students most affected.
* Thousands of students have completely vanished from the education system altogether.

These aren't just statistics, friend. I’m seeing it firsthand. As a single mom of school-aged kids, I’ve witnessed both the short and long-term impacts of keeping my children home. Isolation can negatively impact anyone if it goes on as long as it has, but it’s particularly harmful to those with developing brains. But Dr. Fauci and his team of tyrannical bureaucrats want to ignore the science to boost their own authority. **I've had enough. I'm standing up for our kids and our freedom and demanding that we FIRE FAUCI. I hope you'll join me by signing my petition:[https://secure.winred.com/nancymace/fauci-149695/](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=a611cd33560046af8d6cb95279d5a229&_e=0YZisKVDh5iVHidTTtrMJcPoJcGZeUCu46zccn_FtTsITLt1N_dSumGuZJhzp6WqtGkmFX2ywtyamA1152c3ECKHVf12sdjFSRWsR7ul_MMv3Mm653r7IGi60MDqqXt3WA-5-FsJeUmIkHB4ZDa25Du88yDa3Nr2O_4ij1iLR2uyINOcqh9wRdjObvxMfqECdpXvT_MueO2pEr_B9dc_hWlSz2z2fcWnBE4TmnCWqzG0NcpvnRJaFh6meo7Y7jHIxW4CHHjA5lCm9ca7-FXvHKtzWh_eDc5XUlIe-2hSrnetOHcElz594tBYI0bCGQvsDKVEMEFqkTnasghOEyCKS6GhIdRHBF7XU_EM7hvI11reCKAZoI_DdXsCH_jaeH5mqTDkvB0ZQZlXHum3ggsDNT9h5CjG5eECYJ45e7RMOGVfvwzK3rta4zzvrnm-Xfm5lMZVdGf3KUvHlmGovrrlpbTKkKtJuTaztlbZYb4h70o%3D)** Thank you, [](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=a611cd33560046af8d6cb95279d5a229&_e=0YZisKVDh5iVHidTTtrMJcPoJcGZeUCu46zccn_FtTsITLt1N_dSumGuZJhzp6WqtGkmFX2ywtyamA1152c3ECKHVf12sdjFSRWsR7ul_MMv3Mm653r7IGi60MDqqXt3WA-5-FsJeUmIkHB4ZDa25Du88yDa3Nr2O_4ij1iLR2uyINOcqh9wRdjObvxMfqECdpXvT_MueO2pEr_B9dc_hWlSz2z2fcWnBE4TmnCWqzG0NcpvnRJaFh6meo7Y7jHIxW4CHHjA5lCm9ca7-FXvHC-uj4YymkPJ6xK83Ve__mTBRNEFo_X3q6u2F0PVBEWeGWuk489A4ns-F-PqKPX2SOWR8ZoVbAq1yJX56qt55jF97T5t1jkmwx5Z3uCAYWWF5woVb3RLBJodWeE89qRbi5pJ1XkiHvp95aZEl9-CQCgiPUkabkf-xvq4sI5OtyL6m5z503LKjO1QqcIiQkcPxTrleHkB9ND4Z_Cl2FUJZ9A%3D) Nancy Mace |

Peter,

If you went down to our southern border right now, do you know what you’d see?

25,000 children shoved into cages because their parents abandoned them once they stepped foot on American soil.

**As a dad with two toddlers and another baby due this week, this makes me sick.**

The Biden Administration _**refuses**_ to admit that they’ve got a crisis on their hands. Heck, Kamala Harris won’t even visit the border to look these poor kids in the face or see the results of her own actions! It’s time we hold leaders accountable.

**I’m leading the charge to end the Left’s reckless open border policy before any more children are used as collateral. Will you join me, Peter?**

Peter ーit’s time to Reopen New York!

As Andrew Cuomo and Bill De Blasio continue their embarrassing political fight over reopening New York, **_real people are suffering._ **

Each day that New York stays locked down, it represents:

**→ Another Small Business At Risk**
**→ Another Child Not in School Learning**
**→ Another Family Fleeing New York State**

Now, we’re hearing that the Small Business Administration has exhausted all of its PPP funding, which means small businesses are hanging by a thread.

That’s why we put together this petition to send to New York Democrats demanding that they put an end to this disaster and reopen New York now!

_[**Peter, will you sign your name now to Demand Democrats Reopen New York?**](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=69e64926dc3a4d1691f0ef2bba450877&_e=o8x5falgGJvHC5vVgNFkRqh3j2e8Q6GeRNCj7-DfrUdKD70h8qgxL-t6ybvZfZ2xIbGkf_PrKa9EWaXKXtYno5M9IFmStDwr7U_1UQIfxlp8LS_x3iNvn1G1z6hczTqrXdtEdK9IQCfcGRN43sLshPJeg0sQ8ZTJBf8yWGEo0rmoWyQoRAn7pLyfY3iWfr50nyXkWikkaeCsv3yWdXe1GSqkCdK4VOi63YaCICoqrlagk-sAhJLku6eltrk8_qK60vdv3wy5G7LNRVrJwp_mSNbuPRxZmWChQAIjpHLcgLOCKo1rr6dXGuyIJlwrYPZSGZCJXUnaA2hrPGF4EIoBBwf3HuH83mzl0KLNqZvIwcmIG-5IPCUH6xDIFnXaByLnjPoQToLDYVCwW5fQ8oP8lImdhXB-usl2no0oVxYrO7iO9GY8oK_1vmt4NWl4XPHZ71nmlGohMxcz-cmb1BkLjCwuCa6V0FSK8Z6MAN3sB1vpeg1xgLPBEPGcqdFqvjqG)___
|

name: Moms for Childcare
subject: Calling on you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MOMS IN OFFICE
body:
Moms can't afford to give up their jobs and take care of their families, all while running a campaign. We need to lessen the risk and level the playing field. Hi Peter, Did you know that women candidates often match and even outraise men, but women remain at a structural disadvantage because it costs more to win as a woman? You heard that right. It costs more for a woman to win the same race than a man. **Women have childcare to pay for. ** On the federal level and in some states, candidates can use campaign contributions for childcare, but this puts women at a disadvantage if they are running against a male incumbent without caregiving responsibilities. **Here is how we are changing the game. ** For the first time ever, Moms in Office established a Childcare Fund. This will allow us to pay for a portion of our endorsed candidates' childcare expenses while they are campaigning. **[_But we can't do this without you_ _**.** _Can you chip in to make it possible for us to pay caregivers fair wages who are helping moms run for office?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/29027191/285105923/600483780?amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM2MzY5ZTg2LWMwYjItZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwNTBmMjM3YWJlZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0xo7aQPec7y5jUQkqTLhUzVW_yJgG4CfeXa193C8pfE=) ** Campaigning for an elected position is a full time job and many qualified women with caregiving responsibilities don’t run for office. They can't afford to give up their jobs and take care of their families, all while running a campaign. Sen. Rick Scott here to talk to you today about two of my biggest targets as Republicans seek to win back the Senate majority next November. I know the election is a long way off, but I want to start familiarizing you to two names: **Sen. Mark Kelly and Sen. Raphael Warnock**.

**[Before I tell you why the future of our country depends on defeating these two radical progressives, let me ask you this question:](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6275d5f0fb8044589d1e39b50b4ee080&_e=Rq_lUGuKABXc9oZA15JssArv19hkdhq9sClxyYJIBaB1PbhZAnARIif2nj7sjb_mImajM1f_deupLaqueD2VyieSbIuF1IA5ZZwByVSHPdT8xnPOuV_24lValxIu4L1Kh7dPAea_zzJ-adrdtMPpgudEYCFdMsNbablmq3zcOhITZMWrzSNJf5fngTxbpit7tIIbznUX-7SRwBawHklh4vHWt-FN7LfbpanySO9RZMfiDp89iKY-J65sR55VjEiKKDbYltXq60xX4bo5J--jdQGS1I7I0wpqK9RQdbkv56rrfLZhygJzDtadpjn_oNUnPLJfqIruHQPYUQy7R8-sBtPRWkL1sxyehs8QH1gdK4ncT74xxOObM81DQDYFqfWlYjf1kMXay3IIPv9IWj4YeQ%3D%3D)** _How is it that two purple states, Arizona and Georgia, are represented in the Senate by men who vote with the best-known socialist in the country, Bernie Sanders, 98% of the time?_

CHIP-IN ANY AMOUNT➔****](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6275d5f0fb8044589d1e39b50b4ee080&_e=Rq_lUGuKABXc9oZA15JssArv19hkdhq9sClxyYJIBaB1PbhZAnARIif2nj7sjb_mImajM1f_deupLaqueD2VyieSbIuF1IA5ZZwByVSHPdT8xnPOuV_24lValxIu4L1Kh7dPAea_zzJ-adrdtMPpgudEYCFdMsNbablmq3zcOhITZMWrzSNJf5fngTxbpit7UAI7bIoUmxKUMqjw0Kxm_RBKvgisHe7euZnpC-XIfL8maLvyw2JPkC4YtxL_wLDndgNejIQaPtE3tlwHVoYW_FeVDvWYicw2dnjGFEAtK8DUEtJxtWNj4RMnb_AzWFW10ax_nrbGOtOwrum3zxmQXMK1y-D05_qi_FNRlufunHiY5oHA1C6oRCYrZd7QL9WmidoxlcQeX8XnPhQvLQqxyQ%3D%3D)

**It’s crucial you know these names because they represent states where I think Republicans have two of our best Senate pickup opportunities**. **Arizona (Kelly) and Georgia (Warnock) are not Democrat states** , yet because of fluke circumstances, each of these men won Senate seats to finish out the term of Republican Senators who were elected to six-year-terms in 2016.

I’m reaching out to you today because the future of the Republic depends on our ability to deliver a knockout blow to Democrats in next year’s election. It’s going to be wildly expensive (trust me I know, my own Senate race in 2018 was one of the most expensive in history).

If the 1st quarter of this year is any indication, this effort to win back our states is going to be gargantuan – **these two senators each raised $4 million in the first 90 days of 2020** ; for comparisons sake, that’s on par with people running for president.

Mark Kelly is a wannabe “moderate” who votes with Bernie Sanders and Elizabeth Warren 98% of the time.

name: Aaron & Rand Paul
subject: did you see the email Rand Paul sent you?
body:
I came to Washington, D.C. just over a decade ago with one overarching mission: to support and defend our Constitution and the political and personal
Hi Friend,

Did you see the email Rand Paul recently sent you? Senator Paul and FEE’s President, Zilvinas Silenas, asked if I would resend you the email.

Please take a moment to read Senator Rand Paul’s message and I’ll let him know you received his message!

\- Aaron Brown

From: Rand Paul
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Subject Line: Help me defeat socialism in the classroom

[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ef0cbd72541a4bb19178aebc5e9ca134&_e=qcy5lxpz7oOqJwnnHVTX6w12mQJCvW39-P1Vbsmauj_mFStKLhYJz_C4nEXaU0sMLUkYS0_x57_RZ6CR8Vo2EvaoNQMERR5xUG6them7LIE9z-6JiJgBR9S_IvEIGm2NhBJ0a8hUl4lUsgAW6SNH10b5a9KJFzonrKOdTQDZ_9B_sRyQLrBNwRxOCH4CznaPWTTjNusoMtbSbvVaeCcJk8zeZX4b4E_eMeiVv_oUMmGhnD1joQ7CbrVEn0Zue4s_nsxid8YB2FtJrQlB1PWG76LoUv6Oaw-84zd5zJ-hhw5IaeCBGKgEUDVSvk6HrWqH)

Friend,

I came to Washington, D.C. just over a decade ago with one overarching mission: to support and defend our Constitution and the political and personal freedoms it upholds. **Do you want to know something important I’ve learned? **

Politicians will not save us.

The Swamp will not save the economy, abide by our Constitution, nor will they restore our Republic. _Politics is downstream from culture_. Restoring our Republic requires a citizenry who understands the principles of the Founding Fathers, capitalism, and our Constitution.

**Which is why I am supporting the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE):** FEE is educating both high school and college students about the true principles of free markets, entrepreneurship, individual liberties, and personal responsibility.

In fact, the Foundation for Economic Education has launched “FEE In the Classroom.”

It is a unique program held in brick-and-mortar and virtual classrooms across the country that teach young Americans the principles of free markets, individual liberty, and limited government.

As thousands of young Americans come to understand the positive impact freedom has on their lives, their communities, and our country through FEE in the Classroom workshops, their most frequently asked question afterwards is : “ _why haven’t I heard these ideas before_?”

You and I both know why these students have never heard the ideas of liberty before: _America’s public schools don’t teach our nation’s founding principles anymore_. But FEE is changing this--and they are doing it in classrooms and virtual classrooms across the country.

[**I am PERSONALLY supporting FEE In the Classroom and am asking all of my supporters to contribute or even sponsor a FEE In the Classroom program. Please click here to contribute $1,000, $500, $250, $100, $50, or even $10. **](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ef0cbd72541a4bb19178aebc5e9ca134&_e=qcy5lxpz7oOqJwnnHVTX6w12mQJCvW39-P1Vbsmauj_mFStKLhYJz_C4nEXaU0sMLUkYS0_x57_RZ6CR8Vo2EvaoNQMERR5xUG6them7LIHSeGBFC1Lq02TDpBYPJ2HN1VhPj7341N7Ieu3biHUPRsPMsKOm40PD7gFLVpAJvbsw8SvTpreovF8nj8ZQ3n3BVc-mhDLwkbt7a-aEP8G2Sbb8z7Z76cD4BvQqyjHSDYPNuy7K9-Tv7FUkz6990XFBGvInQfZpWEpRdiWXxfCvGlNz-hcPQShFaZER73pIkDsQjCMPJxV9zJW5J8p21RDI)

[**Help more high school and college students learn about free markets, entrepreneurship, and our Founding Principles by supporting FEE In the Classroom! **](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ef0cbd72541a4bb19178aebc5e9ca134&_e=qcy5lxpz7oOqJwnnHVTX6w12mQJCvW39-P1Vbsmauj_mFStKLhYJz_C4nEXaU0sMLUkYS0_x57_RZ6CR8Vo2EvaoNQMERR5xUG6them7LIG_NlKFIeK5msvtmYD0Wq6hoNr9mPZz_uqP5Vv9IYq566ceeqXRUvrxPtS0Zwk-eW7s3zJD1mL4-Mr3gleR7qhI1kSnG4OgYDRBH6lea_7PC0Mgi8uKtcKWYYd-c15rGjI7MCO0Ntl_w4zpzuOJEoP5xImZwZ-kXLkXZl7zB3As-6wqQtogbjuv3HiPiSQBX6KrcnKDoE7_GBXYulULfm8g)
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ef0cbd72541a4bb19178aebc5e9ca134&_e=qcy5lxpz7oOqJwnnHVTX6w12mQJCvW39-P1Vbsmauj_mFStKLhYJz_C4nEXaU0sMLUkYS0_x57_RZ6CR8Vo2EvaoNQMERR5xUG6them7LIH-XPw-86HvfvAvUDnl_s2xW1UTevc2G-ehbut_X1JwzZSm9GHzvlhxFE5OpMlsRbb0Aoah-z1Bt9FXObVN6bT4g7eP1ZMcVGbUqz8pOzkiIi7_mNJWXpHiTa4KDXXdwaEiApMsaquItg7PHCPjuQKTRpKjDcHoLcc3p2IsfqeWLXZ4TrW849zsVTXnxMM3wKV6ZWZ9WNcr-IYIMmljD6n7)

**_Let me tell you more about FEE In the Classroom and why you should support this essential program and FEE’s efforts to defeat socialism in the classroom_.**

It’s no secret the Radical Left, Cancel Culture, and big government have teamed up to indoctrinate our nation’s youth into embracing socialism.

The sad truth is that free market capitalism, the history of our Founding Fathers, entrepreneurship, and are NOT being taught in high schools or college campuses across the country.

FEE’s President, Zilvinas Silenas, knows this more than anyone... Zilvinas once lived under the Soviet Union’s Communist rule in Lithuania. He’s now made it his life’s mission to educate young people about the dangers of socialism and how free markets and free people solve problems.

Trust me... if some of my colleagues in the U.S. Senate attended a FEE In the Classroom teaching, we would not be the same mess we are in today.

**Here is our goal:** I am trying to help FEE raise $25,000 in the next 48 hours to help fund FEE In the Classroom workshops for over 1,000 students. I hope you will consider making a donation of ANY size by using one of the links below:

[**Donate $10 >>>
Donate $35 >>>
Donate $50 >>>
Donate $100 >>>
Donate $250 >>>
Donate $500 >>>
Donate $1,000 >>>
Donate Any Amount >>> **](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ef0cbd72541a4bb19178aebc5e9ca134&_e=qcy5lxpz7oOqJwnnHVTX6w12mQJCvW39-P1Vbsmauj_mFStKLhYJz_C4nEXaU0sMLUkYS0_x57_RZ6CR8Vo2EvaoNQMERR5xUG6them7LIH6b7EmSI736iKUlsudRll-HhdEBAwJvlSEx-cdAvit-OU0kLGzXItlH5u89pD8maZdiVDsAAMwq6Jpf54Iq4UGKrdxVGjLur-LXj8ENHv1nrpV6D5yZdnQl6afpCJ2ec-xnd1xh3Cc3Isb80PPKw7re-MxlyK9D0GR8CdT6InIsApDJQZCcOzN5S9FnniDLzhwtcyZf61aj2TF7PPYi-6p)

Friend, I’m sure you share my frustration with the direction of our country. We cannot count on our government for fiscal restraint, nor our schools or universities for any fair argument for free-market ideas.

[**Today I invite you to join me, and thousands of other committed Americans, in supporting FEE and contributing to the economic education of the young men and women who will lead our nation tomorrow.**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ef0cbd72541a4bb19178aebc5e9ca134&_e=qcy5lxpz7oOqJwnnHVTX6w12mQJCvW39-P1Vbsmauj_mFStKLhYJz_C4nEXaU0sMLUkYS0_x57_RZ6CR8Vo2EvaoNQMERR5xUG6them7LIEAGOAFnfJd1FA75IybT_b0yekxvVIOrKFbFcm80ygdKLqjmJ1pBpB3yLH5XWDz8BDnnMKaaNM4CPeglTZ0nohUBD5ybX4arylZXoYnHpX2UUWJ0xbqtcdjpeK4d1Re_20LOfsPBwN_BVzzsvgO6KABWseYuFzeVNB8DPxG0TidZyt69fcnx_WRNUST20nF1v2F9iMHeVdTTAlQml0Kno6W)

I hope I can count on your support and see your name on the list of FEE’s newest supporters.

Thank you for everything,

Senator Rand Paul

[**unsubscribe**](http://links.iterable.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_s=ef0cbd72541a4bb19178aebc5e9ca134&_t=etKfYnp1v1lv5Cs4QrPJuSgB0GCc1p4PzIUfslCpdc2AhlqOTwtr5qqYX5IjdGTli5gvLSwCGUQkNug7wBhWH8erV5gidenfcwQPx4cAtaUvC76YLd30bRHQ-TtMFm4U5QptwtWzRXmiLk4DUNi7vlUi4qo6boXj4b5FBiGXZYY%3D)

name: Sean Parnell
subject: Here's why I'm running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Americans for Parnell Committee
body:
Have you heard the news? I'm running as a Republican for the United States Senate in Pennsylvania.
If you would like to unsubscribe, please visit [here](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9640006/224717773/2036/1/?90482085=aHR0cDovL2N0NC5hbWVyaWNhc25ld3NsZXR0ZXIuY29tL3U%2faWQ9MjI0NzE3NzczLjhkZjc4NzE1ODQwOGE3NzA4OTMwYWNmMTRjZjJjYTljJm49VCZsPWEtbWFzdGVybGlzdF9yaWdodC1wYXRoXzEwMTQ5OSZvPTk2NDAwMDY%3d&x=0c213807).
[](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9640006/224717773/200003/2/)
Have you heard the news, Friend?

**I'm running as a Republican for the United States Senate in Pennsylvania.**

For far too long we've sat idly by and watched far-Left Democrats tear our nation apart. With Joe Biden taking direct aim at Pennsylvania's energy jobs, it's time to step up and fight back, before thousands of hard workers in my home state are jobless.

Right now, I'm asking for your support as I take on Chuck Schumer and Nancy Pelosi, who are ALREADY shelling out negative ads against me. They know I'll come to Washington to work for _**YOU**_ , not the Swamp. [**Will you stand with me today, Friend?**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9640006/224717773/200003/3/)

[STAND WITH ME - DONATE TODAY ](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9640006/224717773/200003/4/)
---

I'm proud to be a decorated combat veteran, conservative, and third generation Pennsylvanian. I will always go to bat for you.

But I need you to join my team of grassroots conservatives right now to ensure we can make PA go RED in 2022 and regain our Republican Senate Majority. [**Will you help me get started by chipping in a donation of $100, $50, $25, or any amount?**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9640006/224717773/200003/5/)

Thanks for standing with me and fighting for Pennsylvania and a Republican Senate Majority,Friend.

Sean Parnell

[STAND WITH ME - DONATE TODAY](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9640006/224717773/200003/6/)
---

Paid for by Americans for Parnell Committee.
---

[Privacy Policy](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9640006/224717773/17144/7/)
PO Box 1003, Alexandria, VA 22313

name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: Did you see what Bernie and Pramila said in today’s paper?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
Bernie and Pramila published an op-ed in _The Washington Post_ today that makes the urgent case for expanding Medicare and improving its benefits.
Bernie and Pramila understand how critical this fight is — a necessary push to lower the Medicare eligibility age, expand Medicare to cover dental, hearing, and vision care, and empower Medicare to negotiate prescription drug prices. They also know how important this step is in achieving Medicare for All.
President Biden campaigned on lowering the Medicare eligibility age and lowering prescription drug prices. These policies are also overwhelmingly popular with voters. And they’re incredibly urgent: 40 million people could be added to Medicare. People could finally get critical dental care. Prescription costs for families could plummet.
**It’s clear that expanding Medicare belongs in President Biden’s American Families Plan. Bernie and Pramila know that we need to fight for this in Congress, in the media, in our communities, and everywhere else.**
[**Chip in $3 right away to help fuel Pramila’s work to win an expansion of Medicare. It would be a huge step forward in our fight to win Medicare for All.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210511?refcode=em20210511-282&t=20&refcode2=282_420207_nFw7bp&akid=282%2E420207%2EnFw7bp)
**[Chip in $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210511?refcode=em20210511-282&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=282_420207_nFw7bp&akid=282%2E420207%2EnFw7bp)**
We all know that the current for-profit health care system in America is broken. So broken that it costs lives not to guarantee health care as a human right. It’s time that we took a big step towards Medicare for All by implementing these transformative health care reforms.
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210511-282-footer&t=22&refcode2=282_420207_nFw7bp&akid=282%2E420207%2EnFw7bp)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=23&akid=282%2E420207%2EnFw7bp)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=282%2E420207%2EnFw7bp)
